can all products be set up simultaneously or it has to be individually set up. if the process is gonna be the same for some why not get them all ready to go?

## Copilot

Smart thinking! Yes, we can build **one unified EmpireBox dashboard** that connects to ALL 13 products at once. The API structure is identical across all of them, so one frontend handles everything.

## 🚀 Unified EmpireBox Dashboard

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  👑 EmpireBox                                    [r22gir] 👤    │
├──────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          │                                                      │
│ 📊 Home  │   Welcome back, r22gir!                             │
│          │                                                      │
│ PRODUCTS │   ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐  │
│ ─────────│   │ 12      │ │ $48.5K  │ │ 8       │ │ 156     │  │
│ 🏆 Luxe  │   │Listings │ │Revenue  │ │ Orders  │ │Messages │  │
│ 🛒 Market│   └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘  │
│ 📦 Ship  │                                                      │
│ 👷 Contract   QUICK ACTIONS                                     │
│ 💬 Support│   [+ New Listing] [Get Rates] [AI Describe]        │
│ 📈 Lead  │                                                      │
│ 👥 CRM   │   RECENT ACTIVITY                                    │
│ 🔄 Relist│   • LuxeForge: Rolex listed - 2 min ago             │
│ 📱 Social│   • ShipForge: Label created - 15 min ago           │
│ 🏢 LLC   │   • SupportForge: Ticket #42 resolved - 1 hr ago    │
│ 📜 Apost │                                                      │
│ 🤖 Assist│                                                      │
│ 💳 Pay   │                                                      │
│          │                                                      │
└──────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

Let me build it:

```bash
# Create unified EmpireBox frontend
mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/frontend
cd /opt/empirebox/frontend

# Create the main dashboard
cat > index.html << 'HTMLEOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpireBox Dashboard</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/vue@3/dist/vue.global.prod.js"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
        .gradient-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }
        .card { @apply bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 p-6; }
        .sidebar-item { @apply flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition-all; }
        .sidebar-item:hover { @apply bg-white/10; }
        .sidebar-item.active { @apply bg-white/20 font-semibold; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-gray-50">
    <div id="app">
        <!-- Login Screen -->
        <div v-if="!token" class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center gradient-bg">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-md">
                <div class="text-center mb-8">
                    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">👑 EmpireBox</h1>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Sign in to your empire</p>
                </div>
                <form @submit.prevent="login">
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Email</label>
                        <input v-model="email" type="email" required
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent"
                            placeholder="you@example.com">
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-6">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Password</label>
                        <input v-model="password" type="password" required
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-transparent"
                            placeholder="••••••••">
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" :disabled="loading"
                        class="w-full py-3 px-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-indigo-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition disabled:opacity-50">
                        {{ loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In' }}
                    </button>
                    <p v-if="error" class="mt-4 text-red-500 text-center text-sm">{{ error }}</p>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Main Dashboard -->
        <div v-else class="min-h-screen flex">
            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="w-64 gradient-bg text-white p-4 flex flex-col">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8 px-4">
                    <span class="text-2xl">👑</span>
                    <span class="text-xl font-bold">EmpireBox</span>
                </div>
                
                <nav class="flex-1 space-y-1">
                    <div class="sidebar-item" :class="{active: activeProduct === 'home'}" @click="activeProduct = 'home'">
                        <span>📊</span> Dashboard
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-xs uppercase text-white/50 px-4 py-2 mt-4">Products</div>
                    <div v-for="product in products" :key="product.id" 
                        class="sidebar-item" :class="{active: activeProduct === product.id}"
                        @click="selectProduct(product)">
                        <span>{{ product.icon }}</span> {{ product.name }}
                        <span v-if="product.status === 'ok'" class="ml-auto w-2 h-2 bg-green-400 rounded-full"></span>
                        <span v-else class="ml-auto w-2 h-2 bg-red-400 rounded-full"></span>
                    </div>
                </nav>
                
                <div class="border-t border-white/20 pt-4 mt-4">
                    <div class="sidebar-item" @click="logout">
                        <span>🚪</span> Sign Out
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="flex-1 p-8">
                <!-- Header -->
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-8">
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ currentTitle }}</h1>
                        <p class="text-gray-500">{{ currentSubtitle }}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <span class="text-sm text-gray-600">{{ user?.email }}</span>
                        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full gradient-bg flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold">
                            {{ user?.name?.charAt(0) || 'U' }}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Home Dashboard -->
                <div v-if="activeProduct === 'home'">
                    <!-- Stats -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8">
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Products Active</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ products.filter(p => p.status === 'ok').length }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Total Listings</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ stats.listings || 0 }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Messages</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ stats.messages || 0 }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Tokens Used</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ user?.tokens_used_this_month || 0 }}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Product Status Grid -->
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4">Product Status</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                        <div v-for="product in products" :key="product.id" 
                            class="card cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition"
                            @click="selectProduct(product)">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <span class="text-2xl">{{ product.icon }}</span>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="font-semibold text-gray-800">{{ product.name }}</div>
                                    <div class="text-xs" :class="product.status === 'ok' ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-red-500'">
                                        {{ product.status === 'ok' ? '● Online' : '● Offline' }}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Product View -->
                <div v-else>
                    <!-- Product-specific content -->
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Port</div>
                            <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ currentProduct?.port }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">Status</div>
                            <div class="text-2xl font-bold" :class="currentProduct?.status === 'ok' ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-red-500'">
                                {{ currentProduct?.status === 'ok' ? 'Online' : 'Offline' }}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-1">API Docs</div>
                            <a :href="'http://' + host + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/docs'" target="_blank" 
                                class="text-purple-600 hover:underline">Open Swagger UI →</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- LuxeForge Listings -->
                    <div v-if="activeProduct === 'luxeforge'">
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                            <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800">Your Listings</h2>
                            <button @click="showNewListing = true" 
                                class="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-purple-700 transition">
                                + New Listing
                            </button>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card">
                            <div v-if="listings.length === 0" class="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">
                                No listings yet. Create your first one!
                            </div>
                            <div v-else class="divide-y">
                                <div v-for="listing in listings" :key="listing.id" class="py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
                                    <div>
                                        <div class="font-semibold text-gray-800">{{ listing.title }}</div>
                                        <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ listing.category }} • {{ listing.condition }}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="text-right">
                                        <div class="font-bold text-gray-800">${{ parseFloat(listing.price).toLocaleString() }}</div>
                                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full" 
                                            :class="listing.status === 'live' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'">
                                            {{ listing.status }}
                                        </span>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- AI Tools -->
                        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4 mt-8">AI Tools</h2>
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                            <div class="card cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md" @click="showAIDescribe = true">
                                <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div>
                                <div class="font-semibold">Generate Description</div>
                                <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">AI writes your listing</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md" @click="showAIPrice = true">
                                <div class="text-2xl mb-2">💰</div>
                                <div class="font-semibold">Suggest Price</div>
                                <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">AI-powered pricing</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="card cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md" @click="showShipping = true">
                                <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📦</div>
                                <div class="font-semibold">Get Shipping Rates</div>
                                <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Compare carriers</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- ShipForge -->
                    <div v-else-if="activeProduct === 'shipforge'">
                        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4">Shipping Labels</h2>
                        <div class="card">
                            <button @click="showShipping = true" class="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg">
                                + Create Shipping Label
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Generic Product View -->
                    <div v-else>
                        <div class="card">
                            <p class="text-gray-600">
                                Access the full {{ currentProduct?.name }} API at 
                                <a :href="'http://' + host + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/docs'" target="_blank" 
                                    class="text-purple-600 hover:underline">
                                    http://{{ host }}:{{ currentProduct?.port }}/docs
                                </a>
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- New Listing Modal -->
        <div v-if="showNewListing" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg">
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Create New Listing</h2>
                <form @submit.prevent="createListing">
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Title</label>
                        <input v-model="newListing.title" required class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Description</label>
                        <textarea v-model="newListing.description" rows="3" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg"></textarea>
                        <button type="button" @click="aiGenerateDescription" class="text-sm text-purple-600 mt-1">
                            ✨ AI Generate
                        </button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Price</label>
                            <input v-model="newListing.price" type="number" step="0.01" required class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Category</label>
                            <select v-model="newListing.category" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                                <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                                <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                                <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                                <option value="shoes">Shoes</option>
                                <option value="clothing">Clothing</option>
                                <option value="accessories">Accessories</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Condition</label>
                        <select v-model="newListing.condition" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                            <option value="new">New</option>
                            <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                            <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                            <option value="good">Good</option>
                            <option value="fair">Fair</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-3 justify-end">
                        <button type="button" @click="showNewListing = false" class="px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg">Cancel</button>
                        <button type="submit" class="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg">Create Listing</button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AI Description Modal -->
        <div v-if="showAIDescribe" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg">
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">✨ AI Description Generator</h2>
                <div class="mb-4">
                    <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Item Title</label>
                    <input v-model="aiDescribe.title" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg" placeholder="e.g., Louis Vuitton Neverfull MM">
                </div>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Category</label>
                        <select v-model="aiDescribe.category" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                            <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                            <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                            <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                            <option value="shoes">Shoes</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Condition</label>
                        <select v-model="aiDescribe.condition" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                            <option value="new">New</option>
                            <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                            <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button @click="generateDescription" :disabled="aiLoading" 
                    class="w-full py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg mb-4 disabled:opacity-50">
                    {{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : 'Generate Description' }}
                </button>
                <div v-if="aiDescribe.result" class="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                    <div class="text-sm font-medium mb-2">Generated Description:</div>
                    <p class="text-gray-700">{{ aiDescribe.result }}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-end mt-4">
                    <button @click="showAIDescribe = false" class="px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg">Close</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    const { createApp } = Vue;
    
    createApp({
        data() {
            return {
                host: window.location.hostname,
                token: localStorage.getItem('empirebox_token'),
                user: null,
                email: 'empirebox2026@gmail.com',
                password: '',
                loading: false,
                error: '',
                activeProduct: 'home',
                products: [
                    { id: 'marketforge', name: 'MarketForge', icon: '🛒', port: 8010, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'contractorforge', name: 'ContractorForge', icon: '👷', port: 8020, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'luxeforge', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: '🏆', port: 8030, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'supportforge', name: 'SupportForge', icon: '💬', port: 8040, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'leadforge', name: 'LeadForge', icon: '📈', port: 8050, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'shipforge', name: 'ShipForge', icon: '📦', port: 8060, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'forgecrm', name: 'ForgeCRM', icon: '👥', port: 8070, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'relistapp', name: 'RelistApp', icon: '🔄', port: 8080, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'socialforge', name: 'SocialForge', icon: '📱', port: 8090, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'llcfactory', name: 'LLCFactory', icon: '🏢', port: 8100, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'apostapp', name: 'ApostApp', icon: '📜', port: 8110, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'empireassist', name: 'EmpireAssist', icon: '🤖', port: 8120, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'empirepay', name: 'EmpirePay', icon: '💳', port: 8130, status: 'checking' },
                ],
                listings: [],
                stats: {},
                showNewListing: false,
                showAIDescribe: false,
                showAIPrice: false,
                showShipping: false,
                aiLoading: false,
                newListing: { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' },
                aiDescribe: { title: '', category: 'handbags', condition: 'like new', result: '' }
            }
        },
        computed: {
            currentProduct() {
                return this.products.find(p => p.id === this.activeProduct);
            },
            currentTitle() {
                if (this.activeProduct === 'home') return 'Dashboard';
                return this.currentProduct?.name || '';
            },
            currentSubtitle() {
                if (this.activeProduct === 'home') return 'Welcome to your empire';
                return `Port ${this.currentProduct?.port}`;
            }
        },
        async mounted() {
            if (this.token) {
                await this.loadUser();
                this.checkAllProducts();
            }
        },
        methods: {
            async login() {
                this.loading = true;
                this.error = '';
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/auth/auth/login`, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ email: this.email, password: this.password })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    if (data.access_token) {
                        this.token = data.access_token;
                        localStorage.setItem('empirebox_token', this.token);
                        await this.loadUser();
                        this.checkAllProducts();
                    } else {
                        this.error = data.detail || 'Login failed';
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    this.error = 'Connection failed';
                }
                this.loading = false;
            },
            async loadUser() {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/users/users/me`, {
                        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}` }
                    });
                    this.user = await res.json();
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Failed to load user');
                }
            },
            logout() {
                this.token = null;
                this.user = null;
                localStorage.removeItem('empirebox_token');
            },
            async checkAllProducts() {
                for (const product of this.products) {
                    try {
                        const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:${product.port}/health`, { 
                            signal: AbortSignal.timeout(2000) 
                        });
                        product.status = res.ok ? 'ok' : 'error';
                    } catch {
                        product.status = 'error';
                    }
                }
            },
            async selectProduct(product) {
                this.activeProduct = product.id;
                if (product.id === 'luxeforge') {
                    await this.loadListings();
                }
            },
            async loadListings() {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/listings/listings`, {
                        headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}` }
                    });
                    this.listings = await res.json();
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Failed to load listings');
                }
            },
            async createListing() {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/listings/listings`, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 
                            'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`,
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify(this.newListing)
                    });
                    if (res.ok) {
                        this.showNewListing = false;
                        this.newListing = { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' };
                        await this.loadListings();
                    }
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('Failed to create listing');
                }
            },
            async generateDescription() {
                this.aiLoading = true;
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/ai/ai/generate-description`, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 
                            'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`,
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            title: this.aiDescribe.title,
                            category: this.aiDescribe.category,
                            condition: this.aiDescribe.condition
                        })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    this.aiDescribe.result = data.description;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('AI generation failed');
                }
                this.aiLoading = false;
            },
            async aiGenerateDescription() {
                if (!this.newListing.title) return;
                this.aiLoading = true;
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/ai/ai/generate-description`, {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 
                            'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`,
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            title: this.newListing.title,
                            category: this.newListing.category,
                            condition: this.newListing.condition
                        })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    this.newListing.description = data.description;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('AI generation failed');
                }
                this.aiLoading = false;
            }
        }
    }).mount('#app');
    </script>
</body>
</html>

ls -la /opt/empirebox/frontend/
```

## Copilot

Permission issue. Let me fix that:

```bash
# Create with sudo
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/frontend
sudo chown $USER:$USER /opt/empirebox/frontend
cd /opt/empirebox/frontend

# Create the main dashboard
cat > index.html << 'HTMLEOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpireBox Dashboard</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/vue@3/dist/vue.global.prod.js"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
        .gradient-bg { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-gray-50">
    <div id="app">
        <!-- Login Screen -->
        <div v-if="!token" class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center gradient-bg">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-md">
                <div class="text-center mb-8">
                    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-800">👑 EmpireBox</h1>
                    <p class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Sign in to your empire</p>
                </div>
                <form @submit.prevent="login">
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Email</label>
                        <input v-model="email" type="email" required
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500">
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-6">
                        <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Password</label>
                        <input v-model="password" type="password" required
                            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500">
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" :disabled="loading"
                        class="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-indigo-600 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg hover:opacity-90">
                        {{ loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In' }}
                    </button>
                    <p v-if="error" class="mt-4 text-red-500 text-center text-sm">{{ error }}</p>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Main Dashboard -->
        <div v-else class="min-h-screen flex">
            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="w-64 gradient-bg text-white p-4 flex flex-col">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-8 px-4">
                    <span class="text-2xl">👑</span>
                    <span class="text-xl font-bold">EmpireBox</span>
                </div>
                <nav class="flex-1 space-y-1">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer" 
                        :class="activeProduct === 'home' ? 'bg-white/20' : 'hover:bg-white/10'"
                        @click="activeProduct = 'home'">
                        <span>📊</span> Dashboard
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-xs uppercase text-white/50 px-4 py-2 mt-4">Products</div>
                    <div v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" 
                        class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer"
                        :class="activeProduct === p.id ? 'bg-white/20' : 'hover:bg-white/10'"
                        @click="selectProduct(p)">
                        <span>{{ p.icon }}</span> {{ p.name }}
                        <span class="ml-auto w-2 h-2 rounded-full" :class="p.status === 'ok' ? 'bg-green-400' : 'bg-red-400'"></span>
                    </div>
                </nav>
                <div class="border-t border-white/20 pt-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10" @click="logout">
                        <span>🚪</span> Sign Out
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="flex-1 p-8">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-8">
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800">{{ activeProduct === 'home' ? 'Dashboard' : currentProduct?.name }}</h1>
                        <p class="text-gray-500">{{ user?.email }}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Home Dashboard -->
                <div v-if="activeProduct === 'home'">
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8">
                        <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-6">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Products Online</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ products.filter(p => p.status === 'ok').length }}/13</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-6">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Listings</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ listings.length }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-6">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Tier</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold capitalize">{{ user?.tier || 'free' }}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-6">
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">AI Tokens</div>
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ user?.tokens_used_this_month || 0 }}/{{ user?.tokens_limit || 100 }}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">All Products</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                        <div v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" @click="selectProduct(p)"
                            class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition">
                            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <span class="text-2xl">{{ p.icon }}</span>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="font-semibold">{{ p.name }}</div>
                                    <div class="text-xs" :class="p.status === 'ok' ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-red-500'">
                                        {{ p.status === 'ok' ? '● Online' : '● Offline' }}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- LuxeForge -->
                <div v-else-if="activeProduct === 'luxeforge'">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">Your Listings</h2>
                        <button @click="showModal = 'newListing'" class="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg">+ New Listing</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border">
                        <div v-if="listings.length === 0" class="p-8 text-center text-gray-500">No listings yet</div>
                        <div v-else class="divide-y">
                            <div v-for="l in listings" :key="l.id" class="p-4 flex justify-between">
                                <div>
                                    <div class="font-semibold">{{ l.title }}</div>
                                    <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ l.category }} • {{ l.condition }}</div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="text-right">
                                    <div class="font-bold">${{ parseFloat(l.price).toLocaleString() }}</div>
                                    <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full" :class="l.status === 'live' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100'">{{ l.status }}</span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mt-8 mb-4">AI Tools</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                        <div @click="showModal = 'aiDescribe'" class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md">
                            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div>
                            <div class="font-semibold">Generate Description</div>
                        </div>
                        <div @click="showModal = 'aiPrice'" class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md">
                            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">💰</div>
                            <div class="font-semibold">Suggest Price</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md">
                            <a :href="'http://' + host + ':8030/docs'" target="_blank" class="block">
                                <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📖</div>
                                <div class="font-semibold">Full API Docs</div>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Generic Product -->
                <div v-else class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border p-6">
                    <p class="mb-4">Access {{ currentProduct?.name }} API documentation:</p>
                    <a :href="'http://' + host + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/docs'" target="_blank" 
                        class="inline-block px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg">
                        Open {{ currentProduct?.name }} Docs →
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- New Listing Modal -->
        <div v-if="showModal === 'newListing'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50" @click.self="showModal = null">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg">
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Create Listing</h2>
                <form @submit.prevent="createListing">
                    <input v-model="newListing.title" placeholder="Title" required class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg mb-3">
                    <textarea v-model="newListing.description" placeholder="Description" rows="3" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg mb-1"></textarea>
                    <button type="button" @click="aiGenerate" class="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-3">✨ AI Generate</button>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-4">
                        <input v-model="newListing.price" type="number" step="0.01" placeholder="Price" required class="px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                        <select v-model="newListing.category" class="px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                            <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                            <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                            <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                            <option value="shoes">Shoes</option>
                        </select>
                        <select v-model="newListing.condition" class="px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                            <option value="new">New</option>
                            <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                            <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                            <option value="good">Good</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-3 justify-end">
                        <button type="button" @click="showModal = null" class="px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg">Cancel</button>
                        <button type="submit" class="px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg">Create</button>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AI Describe Modal -->
        <div v-if="showModal === 'aiDescribe'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50" @click.self="showModal = null">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg">
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">✨ AI Description Generator</h2>
                <input v-model="aiForm.title" placeholder="Item title (e.g., Rolex Submariner)" class="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg mb-3">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-4">
                    <select v-model="aiForm.category" class="px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                        <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                        <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                        <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                    </select>
                    <select v-model="aiForm.condition" class="px-3 py-2 border rounded-lg">
                        <option value="new">New</option>
                        <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                        <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <button @click="generateDesc" :disabled="aiLoading" class="w-full py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg mb-4">
                    {{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : 'Generate' }}
                </button>
                <div v-if="aiForm.result" class="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">{{ aiForm.result }}</div>
                <div class="flex justify-end mt-4">
                    <button @click="showModal = null" class="px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg">Close</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    const { createApp } = Vue;
    createApp({
        data() {
            return {
                host: window.location.hostname,
                token: localStorage.getItem('empirebox_token'),
                user: null, email: 'empirebox2026@gmail.com', password: '', loading: false, error: '',
                activeProduct: 'home', showModal: null, aiLoading: false,
                products: [
                    { id: 'marketforge', name: 'MarketForge', icon: '🛒', port: 8010, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'contractorforge', name: 'ContractorForge', icon: '👷', port: 8020, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'luxeforge', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: '🏆', port: 8030, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'supportforge', name: 'SupportForge', icon: '💬', port: 8040, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'leadforge', name: 'LeadForge', icon: '📈', port: 8050, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'shipforge', name: 'ShipForge', icon: '📦', port: 8060, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'forgecrm', name: 'ForgeCRM', icon: '👥', port: 8070, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'relistapp', name: 'RelistApp', icon: '🔄', port: 8080, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'socialforge', name: 'SocialForge', icon: '📱', port: 8090, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'llcfactory', name: 'LLCFactory', icon: '🏢', port: 8100, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'apostapp', name: 'ApostApp', icon: '📜', port: 8110, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'empireassist', name: 'EmpireAssist', icon: '🤖', port: 8120, status: 'checking' },
                    { id: 'empirepay', name: 'EmpirePay', icon: '💳', port: 8130, status: 'checking' },
                ],
                listings: [],
                newListing: { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' },
                aiForm: { title: '', category: 'handbags', condition: 'like new', result: '' }
            }
        },
        computed: {
            currentProduct() { return this.products.find(p => p.id === this.activeProduct); }
        },
        async mounted() {
            if (this.token) { await this.loadUser(); this.checkProducts(); this.loadListings(); }
        },
        methods: {
            async login() {
                this.loading = true; this.error = '';
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/auth/auth/login`, {
                        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ email: this.email, password: this.password })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    if (data.access_token) {
                        this.token = data.access_token;
                        localStorage.setItem('empirebox_token', this.token);
                        await this.loadUser(); this.checkProducts(); this.loadListings();
                    } else { this.error = data.detail || 'Login failed'; }
                } catch { this.error = 'Connection failed'; }
                this.loading = false;
            },
            async loadUser() {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/users/users/me`, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}` } });
                    this.user = await res.json();
                } catch {}
            },
            logout() { this.token = null; this.user = null; localStorage.removeItem('empirebox_token'); },
            async checkProducts() {
                for (const p of this.products) {
                    try {
                        const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:${p.port}/health`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(2000) });
                        p.status = res.ok ? 'ok' : 'error';
                    } catch { p.status = 'error'; }
                }
            },
            selectProduct(p) { this.activeProduct = p.id; if (p.id === 'luxeforge') this.loadListings(); },
            async loadListings() {
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/listings/listings`, { headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}` } });
                    this.listings = await res.json();
                } catch {}
            },
            async createListing() {
                try {
                    await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/listings/listings`, {
                        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify(this.newListing)
                    });
                    this.showModal = null;
                    this.newListing = { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' };
                    this.loadListings();
                } catch {}
            },
            async aiGenerate() {
                if (!this.newListing.title) return;
                this.aiLoading = true;
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/ai/ai/generate-description`, {
                        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ title: this.newListing.title, category: this.newListing.category, condition: this.newListing.condition })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    this.newListing.description = data.description;
                } catch {}
                this.aiLoading = false;
            },
            async generateDesc() {
                this.aiLoading = true;
                try {
                    const res = await fetch(`http://${this.host}:8030/ai/ai/generate-description`, {
                        method: 'POST', headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${this.token}`, 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ title: this.aiForm.title, category: this.aiForm.category, condition: this.aiForm.condition })
                    });
                    const data = await res.json();
                    this.aiForm.result = data.description;
                } catch {}
                this.aiLoading = false;
            }
        }
    }).mount('#app');
    </script>
</body>
</html>
```

## Copilot

You already have an **empirebox-dashboard** container running on port 80! Let's check what it is:

```bash
# Check existing dashboard
curl -s http://localhost:80 | head -50

# Check what image it's using
docker inspect empirebox-dashboard --format '{{.Config.Image}}'

# Check if it's the full dashboard or placeholder
docker logs empirebox-dashboard --tail 20
```

<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>EmpireBox Founders Dashboard</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #0d1117;
      --surface: #161b22;
      --border: #30363d;
      --accent: #f78166;
      --green: #3fb950;
      --blue: #58a6ff;
      --yellow: #e3b341;
      --text: #e6edf3;
      --muted: #8b949e;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

    .warning-banner {
      background: #6e1c1c;
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
      padding: 12px 24px;
      text-align: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: var(--accent);
    }

    header {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 20px 32px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
    header .badge {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #000;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>EmpireBox Founders Dashboard</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg: #0d1117;
      --surface: #161b22;
      --border: #30363d;
      --accent: #f78166;
      --green: #3fb950;
      --blue: #58a6ff;
      --yellow: #e3b341;
      --text: #e6edf3;
      --muted: #8b949e;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    body { background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; }

    .warning-banner {
      background: #6e1c1c;
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent);
      padding: 12px 24px;
      text-align: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      color: var(--accent);
    }

    header {
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      padding: 20px 32px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
    header .badge {
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #000;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }

    main { padding: 32px; max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; }

    h2 { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase;
         letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 16px; margin-top: 32px; }

    .core-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .service-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 16px;
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--text);
      transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.1s;
      display: block;
    }
    .service-card:hover { border-color: var(--blue); transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .service-card .name { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .service-card .port { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--blue); font-family: monospace; }
    .service-card .desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 6px; }

    .product-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      gap: 10px;
    }

    .product-card {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 14px;
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--text);
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
      display: block;
    }
    .product-card:hover { border-color: var(--green); }
    .product-card .pname { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; }
    .product-card .pport { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--green); font-family: monospace; margin-top: 4px; }

    .cmd-box {
      background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 20px 24px;
    }
    .cmd-box pre { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--green); }
    .cmd-box .comment { color: var(--muted); }

    footer {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 32px;
      color: var(--muted);
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-top: 48px;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="warning-banner">
  ⚠️ INTERNAL USE ONLY — MASTER CONTROL DEVICE — NOT FOR CUSTOMER USE ⚠️
</div>

<header>
  <div>
    <h1>EmpireBox Founders Dashboard</h1>
  </div>
  <span class="badge">FOUNDERS UNIT</span>
</header>

<main>

  <h2>Core Services</h2>
  <div class="core-grid">
    <a class="service-card" href="http://localhost:7878" target="_blank">
      <div class="name">🤖 OpenClaw</div>
      <div class="port">:7878</div>
      <div class="desc">AI Agent — Founders Mode</div>
    </a>
    <a class="service-card" href="http://localhost:8001" target="_blank">
      <div class="name">🎛️ Control Center</div>
      <div class="port">:8001</div>
      <div class="desc">Fleet Management API</div>
    </a>
    <a class="service-card" href="http://localhost:8000/docs" target="_blank">
      <div class="name">⚡ API Gateway</div>
      <div class="port">:8000</div>
      <div class="desc">EmpireBox API Docs</div>
    </a>
    <a class="service-card" href="http://localhost:9000" target="_blank">
      <div class="name">🐳 Portainer</div>
      <div class="port">:9000</div>
      <div class="desc">Docker Management</div>
    </a>
    <a class="service-card" href="http://localhost:11434" target="_blank">
      <div class="name">🦙 Ollama</div>
      <div class="port">:11434</div>
      <div class="desc">Local AI Models</div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <h2>Products (13)</h2>
  <div class="product-grid">
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8010" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🛒 MarketForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8010</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8020" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🏗️ ContractorForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8020</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8030" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">✨ LuxeForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8030</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8040" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">💬 SupportForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8040</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8050" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🎯 LeadForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8050</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8060" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">📦 ShipForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8060</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8070" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">📋 ForgeCRM</div>
      <div class="pport">:8070</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8080" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🔁 RelistApp</div>
      <div class="pport">:8080</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8090" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">📱 SocialForge</div>
      <div class="pport">:8090</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8100" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🏢 LLCFactory</div>
      <div class="pport">:8100</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8110" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">📜 ApostApp</div>
      <div class="pport">:8110</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8120" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">🤝 EmpireAssist</div>
      <div class="pport">:8120</div>
    </a>
    <a class="product-card" href="http://localhost:8130" target="_blank">
      <div class="pname">💳 EmpirePay</div>
      <div class="pport">:8130</div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <h2>Quick Commands (SSH: ssh empirebox@empirebox.local)</h2>
  <div class="cmd-box">
    <pre><span class="comment"># Product management</span>
ebox list                  <span class="comment"># List all products + status</span>
ebox status                <span class="comment"># Show running products</span>
ebox start marketforge     <span class="comment"># Start a product</span>
ebox stop marketforge      <span class="comment"># Stop a product</span>
ebox logs marketforge      <span class="comment"># View product logs</span>

<span class="comment"># Bundles</span>
ebox bundle reseller       <span class="comment"># MarketForge + ShipForge + RelistApp + ForgeCRM</span>
ebox bundle contractor     <span class="comment"># ContractorForge + LuxeForge + LeadForge + ForgeCRM</span>
ebox bundle support        <span class="comment"># SupportForge + ForgeCRM + EmpireAssist</span>
ebox bundle full           <span class="comment"># All 13 products</span>
ebox stop-all              <span class="comment"># Stop everything</span>

<span class="comment"># System</span>
cat /opt/empirebox/.env    <span class="comment"># View credentials</span>
tail -f /var/log/empirebox-install.log  <span class="comment"># Install log</span>
/opt/empirebox/scripts/backup.sh        <span class="comment"># Run backup</span></pre>
  </div>

</main>

<footer>
  EmpireBox Founders Unit — Internal Use Only — © 2026 EmpireBox
</footer>

</body>
</html>
rg@EmpireBox:~$

## Copilot

This is a fully functional control panel with:

| **All 13 Products** | Clickable cards linking to each product |

## Access Points

| Service | URL |
|---------|-----|
| **Main Dashboard** | http://10.0.0.6 |
| **Portainer** | http://10.0.0.6:9000 |
| **API Gateway Docs** | http://10.0.0.6:8000/docs |
| **LuxeForge** | http://10.0.0.6:8030/docs |

The only thing the current dashboard is missing is **interactive features** (login, create listings, AI tools directly in the UI). It's currently a static link page.

**Do you want me to:**

1. **Upgrade the existing dashboard** to add login + interactive features (listing creation, AI tools, etc.)?
2. **Keep it as-is** - the current dashboard links to Swagger docs where you can do everything?
3. **Add a separate "User Dashboard"** at a different port for actual workflow use?

The current setup is already production-ready for a power user who's comfortable with the Swagger API docs. Option 1 would make it more user-friendly with forms and buttons.

## Copilot

Great question! Let me show you what modern dashboards look like in 2026 and what I'd recommend:

## 🎨 Modern Dashboard Styles
