## 🚀 My Recommendation: **Hybrid Modern Dashboard**

I'd build you something that combines the best:

| Feature | Implementation |
|---------|----------------|
| **Command palette** | Press `⌘K` to search/action anything |
| **Dark mode** | Matches your current dashboard |
| **AI chat built-in** | Ask "describe this watch" directly |
| **Drag & drop** | Reorder listings, upload photos |
| **Real-time updates** | See orders/messages instantly |
| **Mobile responsive** | Works on phone too |

### Tech Stack
- **Vue 3** + **Tailwind CSS** (fast, no build needed)
- **Headless UI** components (accessible, polished)
- Connects to your existing APIs

---

Want me to build it? I'll create a modern, interactive dashboard that:

1. ✅ Login with your existing account
2. ✅ Shows all 13 products with live status
3. ✅ LuxeForge: Create listings, AI describe, pricing
4. ✅ ShipForge: Get rates, print labels
5. ✅ Messages: Unified inbox with AI replies
6. ✅ Command palette (⌘K) for power users

**Which style do you prefer: A (clean), B (minimal), or C (data-rich)?**

## @r22gir

hybrid model. does this approach work for all products? can it be a one update that works on all different products?

## Copilot

**Yes, exactly!** That's the smart approach. One unified dashboard that connects to ALL products through their APIs. Here's how it works:

## 🏗️ Architecture: One Dashboard, All Products

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    EmpireBox Dashboard                          │
│                    (Single Vue App)                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│   ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐            │
│   │  Listings   │  │  Shipping   │  │  Messages   │  ...       │
│   │  Module     │  │  Module     │  │  Module     │            │
│   └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘            │
│          │                │                │                    │
└──────────┼────────────────┼────────────────┼────────────────────┘
           │                │                │
           ▼                ▼                ▼
    ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐
    │ LuxeForge   │  │ ShipForge   │  │ SupportForge│
    │ :8030       │  │ :8060       │  │ :8040       │
    └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘
    
    + MarketForge, ContractorForge, LeadForge, ForgeCRM,
      RelistApp, SocialForge, LLCFactory, ApostApp,
      EmpireAssist, EmpirePay
```

## ✅ Why This Works for ALL Products

| Reason | Explanation |
|--------|-------------|
| **Same auth** | All products use the same JWT token from `:8030/auth` |
| **Same API style** | All use FastAPI with `/docs`, same patterns |
| **Shared database** | All products read/write to same PostgreSQL |
| **One user account** | Your login works across everything |

## 📦 Modular Components (Reusable)

```
components/
├── DataTable.vue        # Used by: Listings, Orders, Tickets, Leads
├── StatsCard.vue        # Used by: ALL products (revenue, counts)
├── AIChat.vue           # Used by: LuxeForge, SupportForge, EmpireAssist
├── AddressForm.vue      # Used by: ShipForge, LuxeForge, LLCFactory
├── FileUpload.vue       # Used by: LuxeForge, ApostApp, ContractorForge
├── StatusBadge.vue      # Used by: ALL products
└── CommandPalette.vue   # Global search/actions
```

## 🎯 Product Modules (Each gets a page)

| Product | Key Features in Dashboard |
|---------|---------------------------|
| **LuxeForge** | Listings table, AI describe, photo upload, publish to marketplaces |
| **ShipForge** | Rate calculator, label generator, tracking |
| **MarketForge** | Arbitrage finder, price comparison, profit calculator |
| **SupportForge** | Ticket list, AI responses, knowledge base |
| **LeadForge** | Lead pipeline, contact manager |
| **ForgeCRM** | Customer list, notes, activity timeline |
| **ContractorForge** | Job board, contractor profiles, payments |
| **RelistApp** | Cross-post listings, inventory sync |
| **SocialForge** | Post scheduler, analytics |
| **LLCFactory** | Formation wizard, document status |
| **ApostApp** | Document upload, apostille tracking |
| **EmpireAssist** | AI chat, task automation |
| **EmpirePay** | Transactions, invoices, payouts |

---

## 🚀 Let's Build It

I'll create one update that replaces your current dashboard with a fully interactive version:

```bash
# This will:
# 1. Create the new dashboard
# 2. Copy it into the running container
# 3. You refresh browser and it's live

# Ready?
```

Want me to proceed? It'll take about 5 minutes to generate and deploy.

## @r22gir

yes

## Copilot

Let's build it! This will be a comprehensive dashboard:

```bash
# Create the new dashboard directory
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/dashboard
sudo chown $USER:$USER /opt/empirebox/dashboard
cd /opt/empirebox/dashboard

# Create the main HTML file with all modules
cat > index.html << 'HTMLEOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>EmpireBox</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/vue@3/dist/vue.global.prod.js"></script>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script>
    tailwind.config = {
      darkMode: 'class',
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            dark: { 50: '#f9fafb', 100: '#f3f4f6', 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            accent: { 500: '#f78166', 600: '#ea6d50' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  </script>
  <style>
    body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
    .cmd-palette { backdrop-filter: blur(8px); }
    .fade-enter-active, .fade-leave-active { transition: opacity 0.15s ease; }
    .fade-enter-from, .fade-leave-to { opacity: 0; }
    .slide-enter-active, .slide-leave-active { transition: transform 0.2s ease; }
    .slide-enter-from, .slide-leave-to { transform: translateY(-10px); opacity: 0; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; height: 8px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #1f2937; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #374151; border-radius: 4px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #4b5563; }
    input, select, textarea { background: #1f2937 !important; }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
<div id="app">
  <!-- Loading State -->
  <div v-if="initializing" class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
    <div class="text-center">
      <div class="text-4xl mb-4">👑</div>
      <div class="text-xl font-semibold">EmpireBox</div>
      <div class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Loading...</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Login Screen -->
  <div v-else-if="!token" class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-md shadow-2xl">
      <div class="text-center mb-8">
        <div class="text-5xl mb-4">👑</div>
        <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">EmpireBox</h1>
        <p class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Sign in to your empire</p>
      </div>
      <form @submit.prevent="login">
        <div class="mb-4">
          <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2">Email</label>
          <input v-model="loginForm.email" type="email" required
            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-dark-700 focus:border-empire-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-empire-500 outline-none transition">
        </div>
        <div class="mb-6">
          <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2">Password</label>
          <input v-model="loginForm.password" type="password" required
            class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-dark-700 focus:border-empire-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-empire-500 outline-none transition">
        </div>
        <button type="submit" :disabled="loading"
          class="w-full py-3 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 text-white font-semibold rounded-xl transition disabled:opacity-50">
          {{ loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In' }}
        </button>
        <p v-if="error" class="mt-4 text-red-400 text-center text-sm">{{ error }}</p>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main App -->
  <div v-else class="min-h-screen flex">
    <!-- Sidebar -->
    <aside class="w-64 bg-dark-900 border-r border-dark-700 flex flex-col fixed h-full">
      <div class="p-4 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
          <span class="text-2xl">👑</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">EmpireBox</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Search -->
      <div class="p-3">
        <button @click="showCommandPalette = true" 
          class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-left text-gray-500 text-sm flex items-center justify-between hover:border-dark-600 transition">
          <span>Search...</span>
          <kbd class="text-xs bg-dark-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">⌘K</kbd>
        </button>
      </div>

      <!-- Navigation -->
      <nav class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3 space-y-1">
        <button @click="currentView = 'home'" 
          :class="['w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left transition', currentView === 'home' ? 'bg-empire-600 text-white' : 'hover:bg-dark-800 text-gray-400']">
          <span>📊</span> Dashboard
        </button>
        
        <div class="pt-4 pb-2 px-3 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider">Products</div>
        
        <button v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" @click="selectProduct(p)"
          :class="['w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left transition', currentView === p.id ? 'bg-empire-600 text-white' : 'hover:bg-dark-800 text-gray-400']">
          <span>{{ p.icon }}</span>
          <span class="flex-1">{{ p.name }}</span>
          <span :class="['w-2 h-2 rounded-full', p.status === 'ok' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500']"></span>
        </button>
      </nav>

      <!-- User -->
      <div class="p-3 border-t border-dark-700">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2">
          <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-empire-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold">
            {{ user?.name?.charAt(0) || user?.email?.charAt(0) || 'U' }}
          </div>
          <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div class="text-sm font-medium truncate">{{ user?.name || user?.email }}</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500 capitalize">{{ user?.tier || 'free' }} tier</div>
          </div>
          <button @click="logout" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300">
            <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M17 16l4-4m0 0l-4-4m4 4H7m6 4v1a3 3 0 01-3 3H6a3 3 0 01-3-3V7a3 3 0 013-3h4a3 3 0 013 3v1" />
            </svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main class="flex-1 ml-64 p-8">
      <!-- Home Dashboard -->
      <div v-if="currentView === 'home'">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">Welcome back{{ user?.name ? ', ' + user.name.split(' ')[0] : '' }}!</h1>
            <p class="text-gray-500">Here's what's happening across your empire</p>
          </div>
          <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }) }}</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Stats Grid -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-1">Products Online</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ products.filter(p => p.status === 'ok').length }}<span class="text-gray-600">/13</span></div>
            <div class="text-green-500 text-sm mt-1">● All systems operational</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-1">Active Listings</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ listings.length }}</div>
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">{{ listings.filter(l => l.status === 'live').length }} live</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-1">AI Tokens</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ user?.tokens_used_this_month || 0 }}<span class="text-gray-600">/{{ user?.tokens_limit || 100 }}</span></div>
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-1">this month</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm mb-1">Account Tier</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold capitalize">{{ user?.tier || 'Free' }}</div>
            <div class="text-empire-500 text-sm mt-1 cursor-pointer hover:underline">Upgrade →</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Products Grid -->
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">All Products</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <button v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" @click="selectProduct(p)"
            class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-empire-500 transition group">
            <div class="flex items-start justify-between">
              <span class="text-2xl">{{ p.icon }}</span>
              <span :class="['w-2 h-2 rounded-full mt-1', p.status === 'ok' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500']"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="mt-3 font-semibold group-hover:text-empire-400 transition">{{ p.name }}</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">:{{ p.port }}</div>
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Quick Actions -->
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Quick Actions</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <button @click="selectProduct(products.find(p => p.id === 'luxeforge')); showModal = 'newListing'"
            class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-green-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div>
            <div class="font-medium">New Listing</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Create with AI</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="selectProduct(products.find(p => p.id === 'shipforge')); showModal = 'shipping'"
            class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-blue-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📦</div>
            <div class="font-medium">Ship Package</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Get rates & labels</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'aiChat'"
            class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-purple-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">🤖</div>
            <div class="font-medium">AI Assistant</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Ask anything</div>
          </button>
          <a href="http://localhost:9000" target="_blank"
            class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-orange-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">🐳</div>
            <div class="font-medium">Portainer</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Docker management</div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- LuxeForge View -->
      <div v-else-if="currentView === 'luxeforge'">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">🏆 LuxeForge</h1>
            <p class="text-gray-500">Luxury goods listing & resale platform</p>
          </div>
          <button @click="showModal = 'newListing'" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg font-medium transition flex items-center gap-2">
            <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg>
            New Listing
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- LuxeForge Stats -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Total Listings</div>
            <div class="text-2xl font-bold mt-1">{{ listings.length }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Live</div>
            <div class="text-2xl font-bold mt-1 text-green-500">{{ listings.filter(l => l.status === 'live').length }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Drafts</div>
            <div class="text-2xl font-bold mt-1 text-yellow-500">{{ listings.filter(l => l.status === 'draft').length }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Total Value</div>
            <div class="text-2xl font-bold mt-1">${{ listings.reduce((a, l) => a + parseFloat(l.price || 0), 0).toLocaleString() }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AI Tools -->
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">AI Tools</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
          <button @click="showModal = 'aiDescribe'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-purple-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div>
            <div class="font-medium">Generate Description</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">AI writes compelling copy</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'aiPrice'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-green-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">💰</div>
            <div class="font-medium">Price Suggestion</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Market-based pricing</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'aiEnhance'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-blue-500 transition">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📝</div>
            <div class="font-medium">Enhance Description</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Improve existing copy</div>
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Listings Table -->
        <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
          <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex items-center justify-between">
            <h3 class="font-semibold">Your Listings</h3>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input v-model="searchQuery" placeholder="Search listings..." 
                class="px-3 py-1.5 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm w-64 focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div v-if="filteredListings.length === 0" class="p-12 text-center text-gray-500">
            <div class="text-4xl mb-3">📦</div>
            <div>No listings yet. Create your first one!</div>
          </div>
          <table v-else class="w-full">
            <thead class="bg-dark-800 text-left text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
              <tr>
                <th class="px-5 py-3">Item</th>
                <th class="px-5 py-3">Category</th>
                <th class="px-5 py-3">Price</th>
                <th class="px-5 py-3">Status</th>
                <th class="px-5 py-3">Created</th>
                <th class="px-5 py-3"></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody class="divide-y divide-dark-700">
              <tr v-for="listing in filteredListings" :key="listing.id" class="hover:bg-dark-800/50 transition">
                <td class="px-5 py-4">
                  <div class="font-medium">{{ listing.title }}</div>
                  <div class="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate max-w-xs">{{ listing.description }}</div>
                </td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4">
                  <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded text-xs capitalize">{{ listing.category }}</span>
                </td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4 font-semibold">${{ parseFloat(listing.price).toLocaleString() }}</td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4">
                  <span :class="['px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium', listing.status === 'live' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : listing.status === 'sold' ? 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' : 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400']">
                    {{ listing.status }}
                  </span>
                </td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4 text-sm text-gray-500">{{ formatDate(listing.created_at) }}</td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4">
                  <button class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white transition">•••</button>
                </td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ShipForge View -->
      <div v-else-if="currentView === 'shipforge'">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">📦 ShipForge</h1>
            <p class="text-gray-500">Shipping rates, labels & tracking</p>
          </div>
          <button @click="showModal = 'shipping'" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg font-medium transition flex items-center gap-2">
            <svg class="w-5 h-5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"/></svg>
            Get Rates
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- ShipForge Tools -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
          <button @click="showModal = 'shipping'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 text-left hover:border-blue-500 transition">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">📊</div>
            <div class="font-semibold text-lg">Get Rates</div>
            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Compare USPS, UPS, FedEx</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'createLabel'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 text-left hover:border-green-500 transition">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">🏷️</div>
            <div class="font-semibold text-lg">Create Label</div>
            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Print shipping labels</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'tracking'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 text-left hover:border-purple-500 transition">
            <div class="text-3xl mb-3">🔍</div>
            <div class="font-semibold text-lg">Track Package</div>
            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Real-time tracking</div>
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Recent Shipments -->
        <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
          <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-dark-700">
            <h3 class="font-semibold">Recent Shipments</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="p-12 text-center text-gray-500">
            <div class="text-4xl mb-3">📦</div>
            <div>No shipments yet. Create your first label!</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SupportForge View -->
      <div v-else-if="currentView === 'supportforge'">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">💬 SupportForge</h1>
            <p class="text-gray-500">Customer support & ticketing</p>
          </div>
          <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg font-medium transition">+ New Ticket</button>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-12 text-center text-gray-500">
          <div class="text-4xl mb-3">🎫</div>
          <div>No tickets yet</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Generic Product View -->
      <div v-else>
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">{{ currentProduct?.icon }} {{ currentProduct?.name }}</h1>
            <p class="text-gray-500">Port {{ currentProduct?.port }}</p>
          </div>
          <a :href="'http://' + apiHost + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/docs'" target="_blank"
            class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg font-medium transition">
            Open API Docs →
          </a>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-8">
          <p class="text-gray-400 mb-4">This product is available via API. Click the button above to access the full Swagger documentation.</p>
          <div class="flex gap-3">
            <a :href="'http://' + apiHost + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/docs'" target="_blank"
              class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg transition">Swagger UI</a>
            <a :href="'http://' + apiHost + ':' + currentProduct?.port + '/health'" target="_blank"
              class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg transition">Health Check</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>

  <!-- Command Palette -->
  <transition name="fade">
    <div v-if="showCommandPalette" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 cmd-palette z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-[20vh]" @click.self="showCommandPalette = false">
      <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
        <div class="p-4 border-b border-dark-700">
          <input ref="cmdInput" v-model="cmdQuery" placeholder="Search products, actions, or type a command..." 
            class="w-full bg-transparent text-lg outline-none" @keydown.esc="showCommandPalette = false">
        </div>
        <div class="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
          <div class="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase">Products</div>
          <button v-for="p in filteredProducts" :key="p.id" @click="selectProduct(p); showCommandPalette = false"
            class="w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-dark-800 transition text-left">
            <span class="text-xl">{{ p.icon }}</span>
            <span>{{ p.name }}</span>
            <span class="ml-auto text-xs text-gray-600">:{{ p.port }}</span>
          </button>
          <div class="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase border-t border-dark-700 mt-2">Actions</div>
          <button @click="showModal = 'newListing'; showCommandPalette = false" class="w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-dark-800 transition text-left">
            <span class="text-xl">✨</span><span>Create New Listing</span>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'shipping'; showCommandPalette = false" class="w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-dark-800 transition text-left">
            <span class="text-xl">📦</span><span>Get Shipping Rates</span>
          </button>
          <button @click="showModal = 'aiChat'; showCommandPalette = false" class="w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-dark-800 transition text-left">
            <span class="text-xl">🤖</span><span>AI Assistant</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </transition>

  <!-- New Listing Modal -->
  <transition name="fade">
    <div v-if="showModal === 'newListing'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="showModal = null">
      <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl">
        <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">Create New Listing</h2>
          <button @click="showModal = null" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <form @submit.prevent="createListing" class="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Title</label>
            <input v-model="newListing.title" required placeholder="e.g., Rolex Submariner 126610LN"
              class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
          </div>
          <div>
            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Description</label>
            <textarea v-model="newListing.description" rows="3" placeholder="Describe your item..."
              class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none"></textarea>
            <button type="button" @click="aiGenerateDescription" :disabled="aiLoading || !newListing.title"
              class="text-sm text-empire-400 hover:text-empire-300 mt-1 disabled:text-gray-600">
              {{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : '✨ AI Generate' }}
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Price ($)</label>
              <input v-model="newListing.price" type="number" step="0.01" required placeholder="0.00"
                class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
            </div>
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Category</label>
              <select v-model="newListing.category" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
                <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                <option value="shoes">Shoes</option>
                <option value="clothing">Clothing</option>
                <option value="accessories">Accessories</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Condition</label>
              <select v-model="newListing.condition" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
                <option value="new">New</option>
                <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                <option value="good">Good</option>
                <option value="fair">Fair</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
            <button type="button" @click="showModal = null" class="flex-1 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg transition">Cancel</button>
            <button type="submit" :disabled="loading" class="flex-1 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg transition disabled:opacity-50">
              {{ loading ? 'Creating...' : 'Create Listing' }}
            </button>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </transition>

  <!-- AI Describe Modal -->
  <transition name="fade">
    <div v-if="showModal === 'aiDescribe'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="showModal = null">
      <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl">
        <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">✨ AI Description Generator</h2>
          <button @click="showModal = null" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div class="p-6 space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Item Title</label>
            <input v-model="aiForm.title" placeholder="e.g., Louis Vuitton Neverfull MM"
              class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
          </div>
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Category</label>
              <select v-model="aiForm.category" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                <option value="watches">Watches</option>
                <option value="handbags">Handbags</option>
                <option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option>
                <option value="shoes">Shoes</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">Condition</label>
              <select v-model="aiForm.condition" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                <option value="new">New</option>
                <option value="like new">Like New</option>
                <option value="excellent">Excellent</option>
                <option value="good">Good</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button @click="generateAIDescription" :disabled="aiLoading || !aiForm.title"
            class="w-full py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg transition disabled:opacity-50">
            {{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : 'Generate Description' }}
          </button>
          <div v-if="aiForm.result" class="p-4 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg">
            <div class="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Generated Description:</div>
            <p class="text-gray-200">{{ aiForm.result }}</p>
            <button @click="copyToClipboard(aiForm.result)" class="text-sm text-empire-400 hover:text-empire-300 mt-2">
              📋 Copy to clipboard
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </transition>

  <!-- Shipping Modal -->
  <transition name="fade">
    <div v-if="showModal === 'shipping'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="showModal = null">
      <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl shadow-2xl">
        <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">📦 Get Shipping Rates</h2>
          <button @click="showModal = null" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div class="p-6">
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <!-- From Address -->
            <div class="space-y-3">
              <h3 class="font-medium text-gray-300">From Address</h3>
              <input v-model="shipForm.from.name" placeholder="Name" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              <input v-model="shipForm.from.street1" placeholder="Street Address" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                <input v-model="shipForm.from.city" placeholder="City" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
                <input v-model="shipForm.from.state" placeholder="State" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
                <input v-model="shipForm.from.zip" placeholder="ZIP" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- To Address -->
            <div class="space-y-3">
              <h3 class="font-medium text-gray-300">To Address</h3>
              <input v-model="shipForm.to.name" placeholder="Name" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              <input v-model="shipForm.to.street1" placeholder="Street Address" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                <input v-model="shipForm.to.city" placeholder="City" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
                <input v-model="shipForm.to.state" placeholder="State" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
                <input v-model="shipForm.to.zip" placeholder="ZIP" class="px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- Package Dimensions -->
          <div class="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-dark-700">
            <h3 class="font-medium text-gray-300 mb-3">Package Details</h3>
            <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3">
              <div>
                <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Length (in)</label>
                <input v-model="shipForm.parcel.length" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Width (in)</label>
                <input v-model="shipForm.parcel.width" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Height (in)</label>
                <input v-model="shipForm.parcel.height" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
              <div>
                <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Weight (lbs)</label>
                <input v-model="shipForm.parcel.weight" type="number" step="0.1" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button @click="getShippingRates" :disabled="loading"
            class="w-full mt-6 py-3 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg transition disabled:opacity-50">
            {{ loading ? 'Getting Rates...' : 'Get Rates' }}
          </button>
          <!-- Rates Results -->
          <div v-if="shippingRates.length" class="mt-6 space-y-2">
            <h3 class="font-medium text-gray-300">Available Rates</h3>
            <div v-for="rate in shippingRates" :key="rate.rate_id" 
              class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg hover:bg-dark-700 cursor-pointer transition">
              <div>
                <div class="font-medium">{{ rate.carrier }} {{ rate.service }}</div>
                <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ rate.delivery_days }} business days</div>
              </div>
              <div class="text-right">
                <div class="font-bold text-green-400">${{ rate.our_price.toFixed(2) }}</div>
                <div class="text-xs text-gray-500 line-through">${{ rate.rate.toFixed(2) }}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </transition>

  <!-- AI Chat Modal -->
  <transition name="fade">
    <div v-if="showModal === 'aiChat'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="showModal = null">
      <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl shadow-2xl h-[600px] flex flex-col">
        <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">🤖 AI Assistant</h2>
          <button @click="showModal = null" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 space-y-4">
          <div v-for="(msg, i) in chatMessages" :key="i" :class="['flex', msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start']">
            <div :class="['max-w-[80%] px-4 py-2 rounded-xl', msg.role === 'user' ? 'bg-empire-600' : 'bg-dark-700']">
              {{ msg.content }}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div v-if="aiLoading" class="flex justify-start">
            <div class="bg-dark-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-gray-400">Thinking...</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-4 border-t border-dark-700">
          <form @submit.prevent="sendChat" class="flex gap-3">
            <input v-model="chatInput" placeholder="Ask me anything about your listings, shipping, pricing..."
              class="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg focus:border-empire-500 outline-none">
            <button type="submit" :disabled="!chatInput || aiLoading" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg transition disabled:opacity-50">
              Send
            </button>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </transition>
</div>

<script>
const { createApp, ref, computed, onMounted, watch, nextTick } = Vue;

createApp({
  setup() {
    const apiHost = window.location.hostname;
    const token = ref(localStorage.getItem('empirebox_token'));
    const user = ref(null);
    const initializing = ref(true);
    const loading = ref(false);
    const error = ref('');
    const currentView = ref('home');
    const showCommandPalette = ref(false);
    const showModal = ref(null);
    const cmdQuery = ref('');
    const searchQuery = ref('');
    const aiLoading = ref(false);
    const cmdInput = ref(null);

    const loginForm = ref({ email: 'empirebox2026@gmail.com', password: '' });
    const newListing = ref({ title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' });
    const aiForm = ref({ title: '', category: 'handbags', condition: 'like new', result: '' });
    const shipForm = ref({
      from: { name: '', street1: '', city: '', state: '', zip: '', country: 'US' },
      to: { name: '', street1: '', city: '', state: '', zip: '', country: 'US' },
      parcel: { length: 12, width: 8, height: 6, weight: 2 }
    });
    const shippingRates = ref([]);
    const chatMessages = ref([{ role: 'assistant', content: 'Hi! I\'m your EmpireBox AI assistant. I can help you with listings, pricing, shipping, and more. What would you like to do?' }]);
    const chatInput = ref('');

    const products = ref([
      { id: 'luxeforge', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: '🏆', port: 8030, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'marketforge', name: 'MarketForge', icon: '🛒', port: 8010, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'shipforge', name: 'ShipForge', icon: '📦', port: 8060, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'supportforge', name: 'SupportForge', icon: '💬', port: 8040, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'leadforge', name: 'LeadForge', icon: '🎯', port: 8050, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'forgecrm', name: 'ForgeCRM', icon: '📋', port: 8070, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'contractorforge', name: 'ContractorForge', icon: '🏗️', port: 8020, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'relistapp', name: 'RelistApp', icon: '🔁', port: 8080, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'socialforge', name: 'SocialForge', icon: '📱', port: 8090, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'llcfactory', name: 'LLCFactory', icon: '🏢', port: 8100, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'apostapp', name: 'ApostApp', icon: '📜', port: 8110, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'empireassist', name: 'EmpireAssist', icon: '🤝', port: 8120, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'empirepay', name: 'EmpirePay', icon: '💳', port: 8130, status: 'checking' },
    ]);

    const listings = ref([]);

    const currentProduct = computed(() => products.value.find(p => p.id === currentView.value));
    const filteredProducts = computed(() => {
      if (!cmdQuery.value) return products.value;
      return products.value.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(cmdQuery.value.toLowerCase()));
    });
    const filteredListings = computed(() => {
      if (!searchQuery.value) return listings.value;
      return listings.value.filter(l => l.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.value.toLowerCase()));
    });

    const api = async (url, options = {}) => {
      const res = await fetch(`http://${apiHost}:8030${url}`, {
        ...options,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token.value}`, ...options.headers }
      });
      return res.json();
    };

    const login = async () => {
      loading.value = true;
      error.value = '';
      try {
        const data = await api('/auth/auth/login', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(loginForm.value) });
        if (data.access_token) {
          token.value = data.access_token;
          localStorage.setItem('empirebox_token', token.value);
          await loadUser();
          checkProducts();
          loadListings();
        } else {
          error.value = data.detail || 'Login failed';
        }
      } catch { error.value = 'Connection failed'; }
      loading.value = false;
    };

    const logout = () => {
      token.value = null;
      user.value = null;
      localStorage.removeItem('empirebox_token');
    };

    const loadUser = async () => {
      try { user.value = await api('/users/users/me'); } catch {}
    };

    const checkProducts = async () => {
      for (const p of products.value) {
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`http://${apiHost}:${p.port}/health`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(2000) });
          p.status = res.ok ? 'ok' : 'error';
        } catch { p.status = 'error'; }
      }
    };

    const loadListings = async () => {
      try { listings.value = await api('/listings/listings'); } catch {}
    };

    const selectProduct = (p) => {
      currentView.value = p.id;
      if (p.id === 'luxeforge') loadListings();
    };

    const createListing = async () => {
      loading.value = true;
      try {
        await api('/listings/listings', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(newListing.value) });
        showModal.value = null;
        newListing.value = { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' };
        loadListings();
      } catch {}
      loading.value = false;
    };

    const aiGenerateDescription = async () => {
      if (!newListing.value.title) return;
      aiLoading.value = true;
      try {
        const data = await api('/ai/ai/generate-description', {
          method: 'POST',
          body: JSON.stringify({ title: newListing.value.title, category: newListing.value.category, condition: newListing.value.condition })
        });
        newListing.value.description = data.description;
      } catch {}
      aiLoading.value = false;
    };

    const generateAIDescription = async () => {
      aiLoading.value = true;
      try {
        const data = await api('/ai/ai/generate-description', {
          method: 'POST',
          body: JSON.stringify({ title: aiForm.value.title, category: aiForm.value.category, condition: aiForm.value.condition })
        });
        aiForm.value.result = data.description;
      } catch {}
      aiLoading.value = false;
    };

    const getShippingRates = async () => {
      loading.value = true;
      try {
        const data = await api('/shipping/rates', {
          method: 'POST',
          body: JSON.stringify({
            from_address: shipForm.value.from,
            to_address: shipForm.value.to,
            parcel: shipForm.value.parcel
          })
        });
        shippingRates.value = data.rates || [];
      } catch {}
      loading.value = false;
    };

    const sendChat = async () => {
      if (!chatInput.value) return;
      chatMessages.value.push({ role: 'user', content: chatInput.value });
      const msg = chatInput.value;
      chatInput.value = '';
      aiLoading.value = true;
      try {
        const data = await api('/ai/ai/generate-description', {
          method: 'POST',
          body: JSON.stringify({ title: msg, category: 'general', condition: 'general' })
        });
        chatMessages.value.push({ role: 'assistant', content: data.description || 'I can help you with that!' });
      } catch {
        chatMessages.value.push({ role: 'assistant', content: 'Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.' });
      }
      aiLoading.value = false;
    };

    const copyToClipboard = (text) => {
      navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    };

    const formatDate = (date) => {
      if (!date) return '';
      return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
    };

    // Keyboard shortcuts
    const handleKeydown = (e) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault();
        showCommandPalette.value = !showCommandPalette.value;
      }
      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        showCommandPalette.value = false;
        showModal.value = null;
      }
    };

    watch(showCommandPalette, (val) => {
      if (val) nextTick(() => cmdInput.value?.focus());
    });

    onMounted(async () => {
      window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown);
      if (token.value) {
        await loadUser();
        checkProducts();
        loadListings();
      }
      initializing.value = false;
    });

    return {
      apiHost, token, user, initializing, loading, error, currentView, showCommandPalette, showModal,
      cmdQuery, searchQuery, aiLoading, cmdInput, loginForm, newListing, aiForm, shipForm, shippingRates,
      chatMessages, chatInput, products, listings, currentProduct, filteredProducts, filteredListings,
      login, logout, selectProduct, createListing, aiGenerateDescription, generateAIDescription,
      getShippingRates, sendChat, copyToClipboard, formatDate
    };
  }
}).mount('#app');
</script>
</body>
</html>
HTMLEOF

echo "✅ Dashboard created! Now deploying..."

# Copy to the running container
docker cp /opt/empirebox/dashboard/index.html empirebox-dashboard:/usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

echo "✅ Dashboard deployed!"
echo ""
echo "🎉 Open http://10.0.0.6 in your browser!"
```

| **Create Listings** | Click "+ New Listing" or use ⌘K |
| **AI Description** | Auto-generates descriptions for listings |
| **Shipping Rates** | Get USPS/UPS/FedEx rates instantly |
| **AI Chat** | Ask anything via the 🤖 button |

5. Set price and click Create

ebox stop marketforge      # Stop a product

ebox bundle support        # SupportForge + ForgeCRM + EmpireAssist

## Copilot

The file is only 8KB - it didn't get created properly (truncated). Let me recreate it in smaller chunks:

```bash
# Start fresh
cd /opt/empirebox/dashboard
sudo rm index.html

# Create part 1 - HTML head and login
sudo tee index.html > /dev/null << 'PART1'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>EmpireBox</title>
  <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/vue@3/dist/vue.global.prod.js"></script>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script>
    tailwind.config = { darkMode: 'class', theme: { extend: { colors: {
      dark: { 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a', 700: '#374151' },
      empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' }
    }}}}
  </script>
  <style>
    body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
    input, select, textarea { background: #1f2937 !important; border-color: #374151 !important; }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
<div id="app">
  <!-- Login -->
  <div v-if="!token" class="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-2xl p-8 w-full max-w-md">
      <div class="text-center mb-8">
        <div class="text-5xl mb-4">👑</div>
        <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">EmpireBox</h1>
        <p class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Sign in to your empire</p>
      </div>
      <form @submit.prevent="login">
        <div class="mb-4">
          <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Email</label>
          <input v-model="email" type="email" required class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border outline-none">
        </div>
        <div class="mb-6">
          <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Password</label>
          <input v-model="password" type="password" required class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border outline-none">
        </div>
        <button type="submit" :disabled="loading" class="w-full py-3 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 text-white font-semibold rounded-xl">
          {{ loading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign In' }}
        </button>
        <p v-if="error" class="mt-4 text-red-400 text-center text-sm">{{ error }}</p>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
PART1

# Create part 2 - Main layout

  <!-- Main App -->
  <div v-else class="min-h-screen flex">
    <!-- Sidebar -->
    <aside class="w-64 bg-dark-900 border-r border-dark-700 flex flex-col fixed h-full">
      <div class="p-4 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
          <span class="text-2xl">👑</span>
          <span class="font-bold text-lg">EmpireBox</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="p-3">
        <button @click="showCmd = true" class="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-lg text-left text-gray-500 text-sm flex justify-between">
          <span>Search...</span><kbd class="text-xs bg-dark-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">⌘K</kbd>
        </button>
      </div>
      <nav class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3 space-y-1">
        <button @click="view = 'home'" :class="['w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left', view === 'home' ? 'bg-empire-600 text-white' : 'hover:bg-dark-800 text-gray-400']">
          <span>📊</span> Dashboard
        </button>
        <div class="pt-4 pb-2 px-3 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase">Products</div>
        <button v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" @click="view = p.id"
          :class="['w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-left', view === p.id ? 'bg-empire-600 text-white' : 'hover:bg-dark-800 text-gray-400']">
          <span>{{ p.icon }}</span><span class="flex-1">{{ p.name }}</span>
          <span :class="['w-2 h-2 rounded-full', p.status === 'ok' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500']"></span>
        </button>
      </nav>
      <div class="p-3 border-t border-dark-700">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2">
          <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-empire-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold">{{ user?.email?.[0] || 'U' }}</div>
          <div class="flex-1"><div class="text-sm truncate">{{ user?.email }}</div><div class="text-xs text-gray-500 capitalize">{{ user?.tier || 'free' }}</div></div>
          <button @click="logout" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-white">🚪</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main class="flex-1 ml-64 p-8">
      <!-- Home -->
      <div v-if="view === 'home'">
        <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">Welcome back!</h1>
        <p class="text-gray-500 mb-8">Here's what's happening across your empire</p>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Products Online</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ products.filter(p => p.status === 'ok').length }}/13</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Listings</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ listings.length }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">AI Tokens</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">{{ user?.tokens_used_this_month || 0 }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5">
            <div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Tier</div>
            <div class="text-3xl font-bold capitalize">{{ user?.tier || 'Free' }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">All Products</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <button v-for="p in products" :key="p.id" @click="view = p.id" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-empire-500">
            <div class="flex justify-between"><span class="text-2xl">{{ p.icon }}</span><span :class="['w-2 h-2 rounded-full', p.status === 'ok' ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500']"></span></div>
            <div class="mt-3 font-semibold">{{ p.name }}</div>
            <div class="text-xs text-gray-600">:{{ p.port }}</div>
          </button>
        </div>
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Quick Actions</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <button @click="view = 'luxeforge'; modal = 'listing'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-green-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div><div class="font-medium">New Listing</div><div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Create with AI</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="view = 'shipforge'; modal = 'ship'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-blue-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📦</div><div class="font-medium">Ship Package</div><div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Get rates & labels</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="modal = 'ai'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-purple-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">🤖</div><div class="font-medium">AI Assistant</div><div class="text-xs text-gray-500">Ask anything</div>
          </button>
          <a href="http://localhost:9000" target="_blank" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-orange-500">

          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- LuxeForge -->
      <div v-else-if="view === 'luxeforge'">
        <div class="flex justify-between mb-8">
          <div><h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">🏆 LuxeForge</h1><p class="text-gray-500">Luxury goods listing</p></div>
          <button @click="modal = 'listing'" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg font-medium">+ New Listing</button>
        </div>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5"><div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Total</div><div class="text-2xl font-bold">{{ listings.length }}</div></div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5"><div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Live</div><div class="text-2xl font-bold text-green-500">{{ listings.filter(l => l.status === 'live').length }}</div></div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5"><div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Draft</div><div class="text-2xl font-bold text-yellow-500">{{ listings.filter(l => l.status === 'draft').length }}</div></div>
          <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5"><div class="text-gray-500 text-sm">Value</div><div class="text-2xl font-bold">${{ listings.reduce((a,l) => a + parseFloat(l.price||0), 0).toLocaleString() }}</div></div>
        </div>
        <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">AI Tools</h2>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
          <button @click="modal = 'aidesc'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-purple-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">✨</div><div class="font-medium">Generate Description</div>
          </button>
          <button @click="modal = 'aiprice'" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-green-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">💰</div><div class="font-medium">Price Suggestion</div>
          </button>
          <a :href="'http://' + host + ':8030/docs'" target="_blank" class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-4 text-left hover:border-blue-500">
            <div class="text-2xl mb-2">📖</div><div class="font-medium">API Docs</div>
          </a>
        </div>
        <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
          <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 font-semibold">Your Listings</div>
          <div v-if="!listings.length" class="p-12 text-center text-gray-500">No listings yet</div>
          <table v-else class="w-full">
            <thead class="bg-dark-800 text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase"><tr><th class="px-5 py-3 text-left">Item</th><th class="px-5 py-3 text-left">Category</th><th class="px-5 py-3 text-left">Price</th><th class="px-5 py-3 text-left">Status</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody class="divide-y divide-dark-700">
              <tr v-for="l in listings" :key="l.id" class="hover:bg-dark-800/50">
                <td class="px-5 py-4"><div class="font-medium">{{ l.title }}</div></td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4"><span class="px-2 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded text-xs">{{ l.category }}</span></td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4 font-semibold">${{ parseFloat(l.price).toLocaleString() }}</td>
                <td class="px-5 py-4"><span :class="['px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs', l.status === 'live' ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400']">{{ l.status }}</span></td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

# Create part 6 - Modals and script
sudo tee -a index.html > /dev/null << 'PART6'
  <!-- Command Palette -->
  <div v-if="showCmd" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-[20vh]" @click.self="showCmd = false">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-xl">
      <input v-model="cmdQ" placeholder="Search..." class="w-full p-4 bg-transparent text-lg outline-none border-b border-dark-700" @keydown.esc="showCmd = false">
      <div class="max-h-80 overflow-y-auto p-2">
        <button v-for="p in filteredProducts" :key="p.id" @click="view = p.id; showCmd = false" class="w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-dark-800 rounded-lg text-left">
          <span>{{ p.icon }}</span>{{ p.name }}<span class="ml-auto text-xs text-gray-600">:{{ p.port }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- New Listing Modal -->
  <div v-if="modal === 'listing'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="modal = null">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-lg">
      <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex justify-between"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">New Listing</h2><button @click="modal = null">&times;</button></div>
      <form @submit.prevent="createListing" class="p-6 space-y-4">
        <div><label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Title</label><input v-model="newL.title" required class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none"></div>
        <div><label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Description</label><textarea v-model="newL.description" rows="3" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none"></textarea>
          <button type="button" @click="aiGen" class="text-sm text-empire-400 mt-1">{{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : '✨ AI Generate' }}</button></div>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
          <div><label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Price</label><input v-model="newL.price" type="number" step="0.01" required class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none"></div>
          <div><label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Category</label><select v-model="newL.category" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none"><option value="watches">Watches</option><option value="handbags">Handbags</option><option value="jewelry">Jewelry</option></select></div>
          <div><label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Condition</label><select v-model="newL.condition" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none"><option value="new">New</option><option value="like new">Like New</option><option value="excellent">Excellent</option></select></div>
        </div>
        <div class="flex gap-3 pt-4">
          <button type="button" @click="modal = null" class="flex-1 py-2 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">Cancel</button>
          <button type="submit" class="flex-1 py-2 bg-empire-600 rounded-lg">Create</button>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
PART6

# Create part 7 - More modals
sudo tee -a index.html > /dev/null << 'PART7'
  <!-- AI Describe Modal -->
  <div v-if="modal === 'aidesc'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="modal = null">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-lg">
      <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex justify-between"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">✨ AI Description</h2><button @click="modal = null">&times;</button></div>
      <div class="p-6 space-y-4">
        <input v-model="aiF.title" placeholder="Item title" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border outline-none">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <select v-model="aiF.category" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border"><option value="watches">Watches</option><option value="handbags">Handbags</option></select>
          <select v-model="aiF.condition" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border"><option value="new">New</option><option value="excellent">Excellent</option></select>
        </div>
        <button @click="aiDescribe" :disabled="aiLoading" class="w-full py-2 bg-empire-600 rounded-lg">{{ aiLoading ? 'Generating...' : 'Generate' }}</button>
        <div v-if="aiF.result" class="p-4 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg">{{ aiF.result }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Ship Modal -->
  <div v-if="modal === 'ship'" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/70 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4" @click.self="modal = null">
    <div class="bg-dark-900 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl">
      <div class="px-6 py-4 border-b border-dark-700 flex justify-between"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold">📦 Get Shipping Rates</h2><button @click="modal = null">&times;</button></div>
      <div class="p-6">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div class="space-y-2"><h3 class="font-medium mb-2">From</h3>
            <input v-model="shipF.from.name" placeholder="Name" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none">
            <input v-model="shipF.from.street1" placeholder="Street" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2"><input v-model="shipF.from.city" placeholder="City" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"><input v-model="shipF.from.state" placeholder="State" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"><input v-model="shipF.from.zip" placeholder="ZIP" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="space-y-2"><h3 class="font-medium mb-2">To</h3>
            <input v-model="shipF.to.name" placeholder="Name" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none">
            <input v-model="shipF.to.street1" placeholder="Street" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none">
            <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2"><input v-model="shipF.to.city" placeholder="City" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"><input v-model="shipF.to.state" placeholder="State" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"><input v-model="shipF.to.zip" placeholder="ZIP" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6">
          <div><label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Length</label><input v-model="shipF.parcel.length" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
          <div><label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Width</label><input v-model="shipF.parcel.width" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
          <div><label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Height</label><input v-model="shipF.parcel.height" type="number" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
          <div><label class="text-xs text-gray-500">Weight</label><input v-model="shipF.parcel.weight" type="number" step="0.1" class="w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg border text-sm outline-none"></div>
        </div>
        <button @click="getRates" :disabled="loading" class="w-full py-3 bg-empire-600 rounded-lg">{{ loading ? 'Getting Rates...' : 'Get Rates' }}</button>
        <div v-if="rates.length" class="mt-6 space-y-2">
          <div v-for="r in rates" :key="r.rate_id" class="flex justify-between p-4 bg-dark-800 rounded-lg">
            <div><div class="font-medium">{{ r.carrier }} {{ r.service }}</div><div class="text-sm text-gray-500">{{ r.delivery_days }} days</div></div>
            <div class="text-right"><div class="font-bold text-green-400">${{ r.our_price.toFixed(2) }}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
PART7

# Create part 8 - JavaScript
sudo tee -a index.html > /dev/null << 'PART8'
<script>
const { createApp, ref, computed, onMounted } = Vue;
createApp({
  setup() {
    const host = window.location.hostname;
    const token = ref(localStorage.getItem('eb_token'));
    const user = ref(null);
    const email = ref('empirebox2026@gmail.com');
    const password = ref('');
    const loading = ref(false);
    const error = ref('');
    const view = ref('home');
    const modal = ref(null);
    const showCmd = ref(false);
    const cmdQ = ref('');
    const aiLoading = ref(false);
    const listings = ref([]);
    const rates = ref([]);
    const newL = ref({ title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' });
    const aiF = ref({ title: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent', result: '' });
    const shipF = ref({
      from: { name: '', street1: '', city: '', state: '', zip: '', country: 'US' },
      to: { name: '', street1: '', city: '', state: '', zip: '', country: 'US' },
      parcel: { length: 12, width: 8, height: 6, weight: 2 }
    });
    const products = ref([
      { id: 'luxeforge', name: 'LuxeForge', icon: '🏆', port: 8030, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'marketforge', name: 'MarketForge', icon: '🛒', port: 8010, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'shipforge', name: 'ShipForge', icon: '📦', port: 8060, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'supportforge', name: 'SupportForge', icon: '💬', port: 8040, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'leadforge', name: 'LeadForge', icon: '🎯', port: 8050, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'forgecrm', name: 'ForgeCRM', icon: '📋', port: 8070, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'contractorforge', name: 'ContractorForge', icon: '🏗️', port: 8020, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'relistapp', name: 'RelistApp', icon: '🔁', port: 8080, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'socialforge', name: 'SocialForge', icon: '📱', port: 8090, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'llcfactory', name: 'LLCFactory', icon: '🏢', port: 8100, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'apostapp', name: 'ApostApp', icon: '📜', port: 8110, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'empireassist', name: 'EmpireAssist', icon: '🤝', port: 8120, status: 'checking' },
      { id: 'empirepay', name: 'EmpirePay', icon: '💳', port: 8130, status: 'checking' },
    ]);
    const currentProduct = computed(() => products.value.find(p => p.id === view.value));
    const filteredProducts = computed(() => cmdQ.value ? products.value.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(cmdQ.value.toLowerCase())) : products.value);
PART8

# Create part 9 - More JavaScript
sudo tee -a index.html > /dev/null << 'PART9'
    const api = async (url, opts = {}) => {
      const res = await fetch(`http://${host}:8030${url}`, { ...opts, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': `Bearer ${token.value}`, ...opts.headers } });
      return res.json();
    };
    const login = async () => {
      loading.value = true; error.value = '';
      try {
        const data = await api('/auth/auth/login', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ email: email.value, password: password.value }) });
        if (data.access_token) { token.value = data.access_token; localStorage.setItem('eb_token', token.value); await loadUser(); checkProducts(); loadListings(); }
        else { error.value = data.detail || 'Login failed'; }
      } catch { error.value = 'Connection failed'; }
      loading.value = false;
    };
    const logout = () => { token.value = null; user.value = null; localStorage.removeItem('eb_token'); };
    const loadUser = async () => { try { user.value = await api('/users/users/me'); } catch {} };
    const checkProducts = async () => {
      for (const p of products.value) {
        try { const res = await fetch(`http://${host}:${p.port}/health`, { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(2000) }); p.status = res.ok ? 'ok' : 'error'; }
        catch { p.status = 'error'; }
      }
    };
    const loadListings = async () => { try { listings.value = await api('/listings/listings'); } catch {} };
    const createListing = async () => {
      loading.value = true;
      try { await api('/listings/listings', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(newL.value) }); modal.value = null; newL.value = { title: '', description: '', price: '', category: 'watches', condition: 'excellent' }; loadListings(); } catch {}
      loading.value = false;
    };
    const aiGen = async () => {
      if (!newL.value.title) return; aiLoading.value = true;
      try { const data = await api('/ai/ai/generate-description', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ title: newL.value.title, category: newL.value.category, condition: newL.value.condition }) }); newL.value.description = data.description; } catch {}
      aiLoading.value = false;
    };
    const aiDescribe = async () => {
      aiLoading.value = true;
      try { const data = await api('/ai/ai/generate-description', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ title: aiF.value.title, category: aiF.value.category, condition: aiF.value.condition }) }); aiF.value.result = data.description; } catch {}
      aiLoading.value = false;
    };
    const getRates = async () => {
      loading.value = true;
      try { const data = await api('/shipping/rates', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify({ from_address: shipF.value.from, to_address: shipF.value.to, parcel: shipF.value.parcel }) }); rates.value = data.rates || []; } catch {}
      loading.value = false;
    };
    window.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') { e.preventDefault(); showCmd.value = !showCmd.value; } if (e.key === 'Escape') { showCmd.value = false; modal.value = null; } });
    onMounted(async () => { if (token.value) { await loadUser(); checkProducts(); loadListings(); } });
    return { host, token, user, email, password, loading, error, view, modal, showCmd, cmdQ, aiLoading, listings, rates, newL, aiF, shipF, products, currentProduct, filteredProducts, login, logout, createListing, aiGen, aiDescribe, getRates };
  }
}).mount('#app');
</script>
</body>
</html>
PART9

# Verify file size and content
ls -la index.html
head -3 index.html
tail -3 index.html
```
