# 1. Create Project Detail Page
cat > /tmp/luxeforge_project_detail.html << 'EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>LuxeForge - Project Detail</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            luxe: { 500: '#8B4789', 600: '#6B2D69' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' }
        }}}}
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">📋</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold" id="project-title">Smith Residence - Draperies</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Project #LF-2026-001</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <a href="/luxeforge_projects.html" class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">← All Projects</a>
                <a href="/luxeforge.html" class="px-4 py-2 bg-luxe-600 hover:bg-luxe-500 rounded-lg text-sm">✂️ LuxeForge</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <!-- Main Content -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
                <!-- Status Bar -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <span class="px-3 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 rounded-full text-sm font-medium">In Progress</span>
                        <span class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Created: Feb 15, 2026</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                        <button onclick="updateStatus()" class="px-3 py-1 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded text-sm">Update Status</button>
                        <button onclick="openInvoiceModal()" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm">💰 Create Invoice</button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Line Items -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Line Items</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                                <div>
                                    <h3 class="font-semibold">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Living Room</h3>
                                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">2 panels @ 48"W x 96"H each</p>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-gold-500 font-semibold">$1,850.00</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-sm">
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Fabric:</span> Silk Dupioni - Ivory</div>
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Lining:</span> Blackout</div>
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Hardware:</span> Included</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-3 flex gap-2">
                                <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded text-xs">Fabric Received</span>
                                <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 rounded text-xs">In Production</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-3">
                                <div>
                                    <h3 class="font-semibold">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Dining Room</h3>
                                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">2 panels @ 72"W x 96"H each</p>
                                </div>
                                <span class="text-gold-500 font-semibold">$2,200.00</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-sm">
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Fabric:</span> Silk Dupioni - Ivory</div>
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Lining:</span> Blackout</div>
                                <div><span class="text-gray-500">Hardware:</span> Included</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mt-3 flex gap-2">
                                <span class="px-2 py-1 bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 rounded text-xs">Pending Start</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Timeline -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Project Timeline</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div class="flex gap-4">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full mt-1.5"></div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">Quote Approved</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Feb 15, 2026 - Client approved quote #Q-2026-042</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-4">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full mt-1.5"></div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">Deposit Received</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Feb 16, 2026 - 50% deposit ($2,425) received</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-4">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full mt-1.5"></div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">Fabric Ordered</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Feb 17, 2026 - 15 yards Silk Dupioni from Kravet</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-4">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 bg-yellow-500 rounded-full mt-1.5"></div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">Production Started</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Feb 20, 2026 - Living room panels in progress</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex gap-4">
                            <div class="w-3 h-3 bg-dark-600 rounded-full mt-1.5"></div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium text-gray-500">Installation Scheduled</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Mar 15, 2026 - 9:00 AM</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Notes -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Notes</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded p-3">
                            <p class="text-sm">Client requested extra fullness on living room panels. Adjusted yardage accordingly.</p>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Feb 17, 2026</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded p-3">
                            <p class="text-sm">Confirmed installation access - doorman will provide building access code day before.</p>
                            <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Feb 19, 2026</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <textarea class="w-full mt-4 p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm" placeholder="Add a note..." rows="2"></textarea>
                    <button class="mt-2 px-4 py-2 bg-luxe-600 hover:bg-luxe-500 rounded text-sm">Add Note</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="space-y-6">
                <!-- Client Info -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Client</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-3">
                        <div>
                            <p class="font-medium">Jane Cooper Design</p>
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Interior Designer</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-sm">
                            <p class="text-gray-400">jane@cooperdesign.com</p>
                            <p class="text-gray-400">(555) 234-5678</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-3 border-t border-dark-700">
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">End Client</p>
                            <p class="font-medium">Mr. & Mrs. Smith</p>
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">123 Park Avenue, NYC</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Financial Summary -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Financial</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                        <div class="flex justify-between"><span class="text-gray-400">Subtotal</span><span>$4,050.00</span></div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between"><span class="text-gray-400">Installation</span><span>$350.00</span></div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between"><span class="text-gray-400">Markup (25%)</span><span>$450.00</span></div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between font-bold text-lg border-t border-dark-700 pt-2 mt-2">
                            <span>Total</span><span class="text-gold-500">$4,850.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between text-green-400 pt-2">
                            <span>Deposit Paid</span><span>-$2,425.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between font-bold border-t border-dark-700 pt-2">
                            <span>Balance Due</span><span class="text-gold-500">$2,425.00</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Documents -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Documents</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded hover:bg-dark-600 text-sm">
                            📄 Quote #Q-2026-042.pdf
                        </a>
                        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded hover:bg-dark-600 text-sm">
                            📄 Deposit Invoice #INV-001.pdf
                        </a>
                        <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded hover:bg-dark-600 text-sm">
                            📄 Fabric PO #PO-2026-089.pdf
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Quick Actions -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Actions</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                        <button onclick="openInvoiceModal()" class="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded-lg text-sm text-left">💰 Create Final Invoice</button>
                        <button class="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm text-left">📧 Email Client</button>
                        <button class="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm text-left">🖨️ Print Work Order</button>
                        <button class="w-full px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm text-left">📅 Schedule Installation</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <!-- Invoice Modal -->
    <div id="invoice-modal" class="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 hidden items-center justify-center z-50">
        <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-2xl p-6 w-full max-w-2xl mx-4 max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold">Create Invoice</h2>
                <button onclick="closeInvoiceModal()" class="text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-2xl">&times;</button>
            </div>

            <!-- Invoice Type -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Invoice Type</label>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                    <button onclick="selectInvoiceType('deposit')" class="invoice-type-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <span class="text-2xl">💵</span>
                        <p class="text-sm mt-1">Deposit</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">50% upfront</p>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="selectInvoiceType('progress')" class="invoice-type-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <span class="text-2xl">📊</span>
                        <p class="text-sm mt-1">Progress</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">Milestone payment</p>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="selectInvoiceType('final')" class="invoice-type-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <span class="text-2xl">✅</span>
                        <p class="text-sm mt-1">Final</p>
                        <p class="text-xs text-gray-500">Balance due</p>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Template Selection -->
            <div class="mb-6">
                <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-2">Invoice Template</label>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                    <button onclick="selectTemplate('professional')" class="template-btn p-4 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-gold-500 hover:border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <div class="w-full h-20 bg-white rounded mb-2 flex flex-col">
                            <div class="h-4 bg-gray-800"></div>
                            <div class="flex-1 p-2">
                                <div class="h-2 bg-gray-300 w-1/2 mb-1"></div>
                                <div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 w-3/4 mb-1"></div>
                                <div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 w-2/3"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-sm">Professional</p>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="selectTemplate('minimal')" class="template-btn p-4 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <div class="w-full h-20 bg-white rounded mb-2 flex flex-col p-2">
                            <div class="h-2 bg-gray-400 w-1/3 mb-2"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 w-full mb-1"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 w-full mb-1"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 bg-gray-200 w-1/2"></div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-sm">Minimal</p>
                    </button>
                    <button onclick="selectTemplate('luxury')" class="template-btn p-4 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gold-500 text-center">
                        <div class="w-full h-20 bg-gradient-to-b from-luxe-600 to-dark-900 rounded mb-2 flex flex-col p-2">
                            <div class="h-2 bg-gold-500 w-1/2 mb-2"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 bg-white/30 w-full mb-1"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 bg-white/30 w-full mb-1"></div>
                        </div>
                        <p class="text-sm">Luxury</p>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Invoice Details -->
            <div class="mb-6 space-y-4">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Invoice Number</label>
                        <input type="text" value="INV-2026-002" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Due Date</label>
                        <input type="date" value="2026-03-15" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Payment Terms</label>
                    <select class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">
                        <option>Due on Receipt</option>
                        <option>Net 15</option>
                        <option selected>Net 30</option>
                        <option>Due on Installation</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Amount -->
            <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4 mb-6">
                <div class="flex justify-between text-sm mb-2">
                    <span class="text-gray-400">Project Total</span>
                    <span>$4,850.00</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between text-sm mb-2">
                    <span class="text-gray-400">Previous Payments</span>
                    <span class="text-green-400">-$2,425.00</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex justify-between font-bold text-lg border-t border-dark-600 pt-2">
                    <span>Invoice Amount</span>
                    <span class="text-gold-500">$2,425.00</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Actions -->
            <div class="flex gap-3 justify-end">
                <button onclick="closeInvoiceModal()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg">Cancel</button>
                <button onclick="previewInvoice()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 rounded-lg">Preview</button>
                <button onclick="createInvoice()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded-lg font-semibold">Create & Send</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let selectedTemplate = 'professional';
        let selectedType = 'final';

        function openInvoiceModal() {
            document.getElementById('invoice-modal').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('invoice-modal').classList.add('flex');
        }

        function closeInvoiceModal() {
            document.getElementById('invoice-modal').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('invoice-modal').classList.remove('flex');
        }

        function selectTemplate(template) {
            selectedTemplate = template;
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-gold-500'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('border-gold-500');
        }

        function selectInvoiceType(type) {
            selectedType = type;
            document.querySelectorAll('.invoice-type-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-gold-500'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('border-gold-500');
        }

        function previewInvoice() {
            window.open('/luxeforge_invoice_preview.html?template=' + selectedTemplate, '_blank');
        }

        function createInvoice() {
            alert('Invoice created and sent to client!');
            closeInvoiceModal();
        }

        function updateStatus() {
            const statuses = ['Pending', 'In Progress', 'Ready for Install', 'Completed'];
            // In real app, show status selection modal
            alert('Status update modal would open here');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
EOF
sudo cp /tmp/luxeforge_project_detail.html /opt/empirebox/dashboard/luxeforge_project_detail.html
echo "✅ Created Project Detail page"

```bash
# 2. Create Invoice Preview Page with Templates
cat > /tmp/luxeforge_invoice_preview.html << 'EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Invoice Preview - LuxeForge</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            luxe: { 500: '#8B4789', 600: '#6B2D69' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' }
        }}}}
    </script>
    <style>
        @media print { .no-print { display: none !important; } .print-only { display: block !important; } }
        .invoice-professional { font-family: 'Georgia', serif; }
        .invoice-minimal { font-family: 'Helvetica', sans-serif; }
        .invoice-luxury { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100">
    <!-- Controls Bar -->
    <div class="no-print bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700 sticky top-0 z-10">
        <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-3 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <button onclick="setTemplate('professional')" class="template-toggle px-3 py-1 bg-gold-600 rounded text-sm" data-template="professional">Professional</button>
                <button onclick="setTemplate('minimal')" class="template-toggle px-3 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded text-sm" data-template="minimal">Minimal</button>
                <button onclick="setTemplate('luxury')" class="template-toggle px-3 py-1 bg-dark-700 rounded text-sm" data-template="luxury">Luxury</button>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <button onclick="window.print()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 rounded text-sm">🖨️ Print</button>
                <button onclick="downloadPDF()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 rounded text-sm">📥 Download PDF</button>
                <button onclick="sendEmail()" class="px-4 py-2 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm">📧 Email to Client</button>
                <a href="/luxeforge_project_detail.html" class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded text-sm">← Back</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Invoice Container -->
    <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-6">
        <!-- PROFESSIONAL TEMPLATE -->
        <div id="template-professional" class="invoice-professional bg-white text-gray-900 rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden">
            <!-- Header -->
            <div class="bg-gray-800 text-white p-8">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold">INVOICE</h1>
                        <p class="text-gray-300 mt-1">#INV-2026-002</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <h2 class="text-xl font-bold">LuxeForge Workroom</h2>
                        <p class="text-gray-300 text-sm mt-1">Custom Window Treatments</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">123 Design District, NYC</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">(555) 123-4567</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Info Section -->
            <div class="p-8 grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 border-b">
                <div>
                    <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">Bill To</h3>
                    <p class="font-bold">Jane Cooper Design</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-600">456 Interior Ave, Suite 200</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-600">New York, NY 10001</p>
                    <p class="text-gray-600">jane@cooperdesign.com</p>
                </div>
                <div class="text-right">
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Invoice Date</p>
                        <p class="font-bold">February 21, 2026</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mb-4">
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Due Date</p>
                        <p class="font-bold">March 15, 2026</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Project</p>
                        <p class="font-bold">Smith Residence - Draperies</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Line Items -->
            <div class="p-8">
                <table class="w-full">
                    <thead>
                        <tr class="border-b-2 border-gray-300">
                            <th class="text-left py-3 text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase">Description</th>
                            <th class="text-center py-3 text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase">Qty</th>
                            <th class="text-right py-3 text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase">Unit Price</th>
                            <th class="text-right py-3 text-sm font-bold text-gray-500 uppercase">Amount</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        <tr class="border-b">
                            <td class="py-4">
                                <p class="font-medium">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Living Room</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">2 panels @ 48"W x 96"H, Silk Dupioni Ivory, Blackout lining</p>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center py-4">2</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$925.00</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4 font-medium">$1,850.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b">
                            <td class="py-4">
                                <p class="font-medium">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Dining Room</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">2 panels @ 72"W x 96"H, Silk Dupioni Ivory, Blackout lining</p>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center py-4">2</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$1,100.00</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4 font-medium">$2,200.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b">
                            <td class="py-4">
                                <p class="font-medium">Professional Installation</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">On-site installation with hardware</p>
                            </td>
                            <td class="text-center py-4">1</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$350.00</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4 font-medium">$350.00</td>
                        </tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <!-- Totals -->
                <div class="mt-8 flex justify-end">
                    <div class="w-72">
                        <div class="flex justify-between py-2">
                            <span class="text-gray-600">Subtotal</span>
                            <span>$4,400.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between py-2">
                            <span class="text-gray-600">Designer Markup (25%)</span>
                            <span>$450.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between py-2 border-t border-gray-300">
                            <span class="text-gray-600">Project Total</span>
                            <span class="font-bold">$4,850.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between py-2 text-green-600">
                            <span>Deposit Paid (Feb 16)</span>
                            <span>-$2,425.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between py-3 border-t-2 border-gray-800 text-xl font-bold">
                            <span>Balance Due</span>
                            <span>$2,425.00</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="bg-gray-100 p-8">
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8">
                    <div>
                        <h3 class="font-bold text-sm uppercase text-gray-500 mb-2">Payment Methods</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Check payable to: LuxeForge Workroom</p>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Zelle: payments@luxeforge.com</p>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Credit Card: Call office</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <h3 class="font-bold text-sm uppercase text-gray-500 mb-2">Terms & Notes</h3>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Payment due upon installation</p>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Thank you for your business!</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- MINIMAL TEMPLATE -->
        <div id="template-minimal" class="invoice-minimal bg-white text-gray-900 rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden hidden">
            <div class="p-12">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-12">
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="text-4xl font-light text-gray-400">Invoice</h1>
                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-2">#INV-2026-002</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <p class="font-bold text-lg">LuxeForge</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-500 text-sm">luxeforge.com</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-12 text-sm">
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 uppercase text-xs mb-1">Billed To</p>
                        <p class="font-medium">Jane Cooper Design</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-500">jane@cooperdesign.com</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 uppercase text-xs mb-1">Project</p>
                        <p class="font-medium">Smith Residence</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-500">Draperies</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <p class="text-gray-400 uppercase text-xs mb-1">Due</p>
                        <p class="font-medium">Mar 15, 2026</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <table class="w-full mb-12">
                    <thead>
                        <tr class="border-b">
                            <th class="text-left py-3 text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase font-normal">Item</th>
                            <th class="text-right py-3 text-xs text-gray-400 uppercase font-normal">Amount</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody class="text-sm">
                        <tr class="border-b border-gray-100">
                            <td class="py-4">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Living Room (2)</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$1,850.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b border-gray-100">
                            <td class="py-4">Pinch Pleat Drapery - Dining Room (2)</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$2,200.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b border-gray-100">
                            <td class="py-4">Installation</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$350.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b border-gray-100">
                            <td class="py-4">Markup</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">$450.00</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr class="border-b border-gray-100 text-green-600">
                            <td class="py-4">Deposit Paid</td>
                            <td class="text-right py-4">-$2,425.00</td>
                        </tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>

                <div class="flex justify-end">
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Balance Due</p>
                        <p class="text-4xl font-light">$2,425.00</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- LUXURY TEMPLATE -->
        <div id="template-luxury" class="invoice-luxury bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 to-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg shadow-2xl overflow-hidden hidden">
            <!-- Gold Header Bar -->
            <div class="h-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-600 via-yellow-400 to-yellow-600"></div>
            
            <div class="p-12">
                <div class="text-center mb-12">
                    <h1 class="text-3xl tracking-widest text-yellow-400 mb-2">LUXEFORGE</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400 tracking-wider">BESPOKE WINDOW TREATMENTS</p>
                </div>

                <div class="flex justify-center mb-12">
                    <div class="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-8 py-4 inline-block">
                        <p class="text-yellow-400 text-sm tracking-wider">INVOICE #INV-2026-002</p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-12 mb-12">
                    <div class="border-l-2 border-yellow-600 pl-6">
                        <p class="text-xs text-yellow-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Prepared For</p>
                        <p class="text-xl font-light">Jane Cooper Design</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-400 mt-2">456 Interior Ave, Suite 200</p>
                        <p class="text-gray-400">New York, NY 10001</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right">
                        <div class="mb-6">
                            <p class="text-xs text-yellow-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Project</p>
                            <p class="text-xl font-light">Smith Residence</p>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <p class="text-xs text-yellow-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Due Date</p>
                            <p class="text-lg">March 15, 2026</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="border-t border-b border-gray-700 py-8 mb-8">
                    <table class="w-full">
                        <tbody class="text-sm">
                            <tr>
                                <td class="py-3 text-gray-300">Pinch Pleat Silk Drapery - Living Room</td>
                                <td class="text-right py-3 text-yellow-400">$1,850.00</td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td class="py-3 text-gray-300">Pinch Pleat Silk Drapery - Dining Room</td>
                                <td class="text-right py-3 text-yellow-400">$2,200.00</td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td class="py-3 text-gray-300">White Glove Installation</td>
                                <td class="text-right py-3 text-yellow-400">$350.00</td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <td class="py-3 text-gray-300">Design Services</td>
                                <td class="text-right py-3 text-yellow-400">$450.00</td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr class="text-green-400">
                                <td class="py-3">Deposit Received - Thank You</td>
                                <td class="text-right py-3">-$2,425.00</td>
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                </div>

                <div class="text-center">
                    <p class="text-xs text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Balance Due</p>
                    <p class="text-5xl font-light text-yellow-400">$2,425<span class="text-2xl">.00</span></p>
                </div>

                <div class="mt-12 text-center text-xs text-gray-500">
                    <p>Payment may be made via wire transfer, check, or credit card</p>
                    <p class="mt-1">Questions? concierge@luxeforge.com | (555) 123-4567</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Gold Footer Bar -->
            <div class="h-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-600 via-yellow-400 to-yellow-600"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function setTemplate(template) {
            document.querySelectorAll('[id^="template-"]').forEach(el => el.classList.add('hidden'));
            document.getElementById('template-' + template).classList.remove('hidden');
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-toggle').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('bg-gold-600');
                btn.classList.add('bg-dark-700');
            });
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('bg-gold-600');
            event.currentTarget.classList.remove('bg-dark-700');
        }

        function downloadPDF() {
            alert('PDF download would generate here (requires html2pdf.js library)');
        }

        function sendEmail() {
            alert('Invoice sent to jane@cooperdesign.com!');
        }

        // Check URL params for template
        const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        const template = params.get('template');
        if (template) {
            setTemplate(template);
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
EOF

## @r22gir

## Copilot

Absolutely! Let me create a template structure that can be replicated across all EmpireBox products. First, let me create a reusable module structure:

```bash
# Create a modules directory and template system
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/dashboard/modules

# Create a module generator script
cat > /tmp/generate_module.sh << 'BASHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# EmpireBox Module Generator

MODULE_KEY=$1
MODULE_NAME=$2
MODULE_ICON=$3
MODULE_COLOR=$4
MODULE_PORT=$5
MODULE_DESC=$6

DEST="/opt/empirebox/dashboard"

# Main hub page
cat > ${DEST}/${MODULE_KEY}.html << EOF
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>${MODULE_NAME} - EmpireBox</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            module: { 500: '${MODULE_COLOR}', 600: '${MODULE_COLOR}dd' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' }
        }}}}
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">${MODULE_ICON}</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold" style="color: ${MODULE_COLOR}">${MODULE_NAME}</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">${MODULE_DESC}</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <span class="text-sm text-gray-500 self-center">Port ${MODULE_PORT}</span>
                <a href="/" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg text-sm">🏠 EmpireBox</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-12">
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_dashboard.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-module-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">📊</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-module-500">Dashboard</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Overview and analytics for ${MODULE_NAME}.</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_projects.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-green-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">📋</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-green-500">Projects</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">View and manage all ${MODULE_NAME} projects.</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_new.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-gold-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">➕</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-gold-500">Create New</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Start a new ${MODULE_NAME} project or entry.</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_settings.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-orange-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">⚙️</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-orange-500">Settings</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Configure ${MODULE_NAME} preferences.</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_invoices.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-blue-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">💰</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-blue-500">Invoices</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Billing and invoice management.</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/${MODULE_KEY}_customers.html" class="bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-purple-500 transition group">
                <div class="text-4xl mb-4">👥</div>
                <h3 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2 group-hover:text-purple-500">Customers</h3>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Customer database and CRM.</p>
            </a>
        </div>

        <!-- Quick Stats -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold" style="color: ${MODULE_COLOR}">0</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Active Projects</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-green-500">\$0</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">This Month</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-blue-500">0</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Customers</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-gold-500">0</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Pending Invoices</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <footer class="border-t border-dark-700 mt-12">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-6 flex justify-between items-center text-sm text-gray-500">
            <p>${MODULE_NAME} © 2026 - Part of EmpireBox</p>
            <a href="/" class="hover:text-empire-500">← Back to EmpireBox</a>
        </div>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>
EOF

echo "Created ${MODULE_NAME} hub: ${DEST}/${MODULE_KEY}.html"

sudo cp /tmp/generate_module.sh /opt/empirebox/dashboard/generate_module.sh
sudo chmod +x /opt/empirebox/dashboard/generate_module.sh

echo "✅ Module generator created"

## @r22gir

rg@EmpireBox:~$ # Create a modules directory and template system
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/dashboard/modules

# Create a module generator script
cat > /tmp/generate_module.sh << 'BASHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# EmpireBox Module Generator

MODULE_KEY=$1
MODULE_NAME=$2
MODULE_ICON=$3
MODULE_COLOR=$4
MODULE_PORT=$5
MODULE_DESC=$6

DEST="/opt/empirebox/dashboard"

# Main hub page
cat > ${DEST}/${MODULE_KEY}.html << EOF
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
echo "✅ Module generator created"oard/generate_module.shgenerate_module.sha>nte
[sudo] password for rg: 
✅ Module generator created
rg@EmpireBox:~$

sudo bash generate_module.sh "contractorforge" "ContractorForge" "🔧" "#f97316" "8020" "Universal SaaS for service businesses"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "supportforge" "SupportForge" "🎫" "#3b82f6" "8040" "AI-powered customer support & ticketing"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "leadforge" "LeadForge" "🎯" "#06b6d4" "8050" "Lead generation & nurturing automation"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "shipforge" "ShipForge" "📦" "#10b981" "8060" "Integrated shipping with EasyPost"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "forgecrm" "ForgeCRM" "👥" "#8b5cf6" "8070" "CRM for managing customers"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "relistapp" "RelistApp" "🔄" "#84cc16" "8080" "Cross-platform relisting tool"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "socialforge" "SocialForge" "📱" "#ec4899" "8090" "Social media management"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "llcfactory" "LLCFactory" "🏛️" "#6366f1" "8100" "Automated LLC formation"

sudo bash generate_module.sh "empireassist" "EmpireAssist" "💬" "#0ea5e9" "8120" "Telegram/WhatsApp business integration"
sudo bash generate_module.sh "empirepay" "EmpirePay" "💳" "#C9A84C" "8130" "Payment processing & invoicing"

echo ""
echo "=== All Generated Modules ==="
ls -la /opt/empirebox/dashboard/*.html | grep -v luxeforge | grep -v workroom | grep -v index

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpireBox - Business Command Center</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' },
            luxe: { 500: '#8B4789', 600: '#6B2D69' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' }
        }}}}
    </script>
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); transition: all 0.3s; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">🏢</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-empire-500">EmpireBox</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Business Command Center</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                <span class="text-sm text-gray-400">Founders Edition</span>
                <a href="http://10.0.0.6:9000" target="_blank" class="px-3 py-1 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded text-sm">⚙️ Portainer</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <!-- CONTRACTOR PRODUCTS -->
        <div class="mb-10">
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-300 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <span class="w-3 h-3 bg-orange-500 rounded-full"></span>
                Contractor & Service Products
            </h2>
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <a href="/contractorforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-orange-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🔧</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">ContractorForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8020</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Universal SaaS platform for service businesses with AI intake</p>
                </a>
                <a href="/luxeforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-luxe-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">✂️</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-luxe-500">LuxeForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8030</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Premium service business platform with luxury market focus</p>
                    <div class="mt-2 text-xs text-green-500">● Active</div>
                </a>
                <a href="/leadforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-cyan-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🎯</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">LeadForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8050</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Lead generation and nurturing automation platform</p>
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RESELLER PRODUCTS -->
        <div class="mb-10">
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-300 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <span class="w-3 h-3 bg-green-500 rounded-full"></span>
                Reseller & Marketplace Products
            </h2>
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <a href="/marketforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-green-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🛒</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">MarketForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8010</span>
                        </div>

                </a>
                <a href="/shipforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-emerald-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">📦</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">ShipForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8060</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Integrated shipping with EasyPost — compare rates, buy labels</p>
                </a>
                <a href="/relistapp.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-lime-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🔄</span>
                        <div>

        </div>

        <!-- SUPPORT PRODUCTS -->
        <div class="mb-10">
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-300 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <span class="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-500 rounded-full"></span>

            </h2>
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <a href="/supportforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-blue-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🎫</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">SupportForge</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8040</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                </a>
                <a href="/empireassist.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-sky-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">💬</span>
                        <div>

                            <span class="text-xs text-gray-500">Port 8120</span>

                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">👥</span>
                        <div>

                        </div>

                </a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- MARKETING, LEGAL & PAYMENTS -->
        <div class="mb-10">
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-300 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <span class="w-3 h-3 bg-purple-500 rounded-full"></span>

            </h2>
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                <a href="/socialforge.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-pink-500">

                        <span class="text-2xl">📱</span>

                </a>
                <a href="/llcfactory.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-indigo-500">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-2xl">🏛️</span>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="font-bold">LLCFactory</h3>

                <a href="/apostapp.html" class="product-card bg-dark-800 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 hover:border-teal-500">

    <meta charset="UTF-8">

You're right! Let me create **EmpirePay** as the central invoicing/payment module with templates that all other modules can use:

```bash
# Create EmpirePay as the central invoicing system with templates
cat > /tmp/empirepay_full.html << 'EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpirePay - Payment & Invoicing</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' }
        }}}}
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">💳</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gold-500">EmpirePay</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Unified Payment & Invoicing Platform</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <span class="text-sm text-gray-500 self-center">Port 8130</span>
                <a href="/" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg text-sm">🏠 EmpireBox</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Sub Navigation -->
    <nav class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
            <div class="flex gap-1">
                <a href="/empirepay.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gold-500 border-b-2 border-gold-500 text-sm font-medium">Dashboard</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_invoices.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Invoices</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_payments.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Payments</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_templates.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Templates</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_gateways.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Payment Gateways</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_settings.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Settings</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <!-- Stats Row -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4 mb-8">
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-gold-500">$24,850</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">This Month</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-green-500">$18,425</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Collected</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-yellow-500">$6,425</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Pending</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-red-500">$1,200</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Overdue</p>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-5 text-center">
                <p class="text-3xl font-bold text-blue-500">12</p>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Active Invoices</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Quick Actions -->
        <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
            <a href="/empirepay_invoice_new.html" class="bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded-xl p-5 text-center transition">
                <span class="text-3xl">📝</span>
                <p class="font-bold mt-2">New Invoice</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/empirepay_payment_link.html" class="bg-dark-800 hover:bg-dark-700 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 text-center transition">
                <span class="text-3xl">🔗</span>
                <p class="font-bold mt-2">Payment Link</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/empirepay_recurring.html" class="bg-dark-800 hover:bg-dark-700 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 text-center transition">
                <span class="text-3xl">🔄</span>
                <p class="font-bold mt-2">Recurring Invoice</p>
            </a>
            <a href="/empirepay_quote.html" class="bg-dark-800 hover:bg-dark-700 border border-dark-700 rounded-xl p-5 text-center transition">
                <span class="text-3xl">💬</span>
                <p class="font-bold mt-2">New Quote</p>
            </a>
        </div>

        <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <!-- Recent Invoices -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-2 bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                    <h2 class="text-lg font-bold">Recent Invoices</h2>
                    <a href="/empirepay_invoices.html" class="text-gold-500 text-sm hover:underline">View All →</a>
                </div>
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-dark-600 cursor-pointer" onclick="window.location='/empirepay_invoice_detail.html'">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-luxe-500">✂️</span>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">INV-2026-002</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Jane Cooper Design • LuxeForge</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-right">
                            <p class="font-bold text-gold-500">$2,425.00</p>
                            <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 rounded">Pending</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-dark-600 cursor-pointer">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-orange-500">🔧</span>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">INV-2026-001</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">ABC Plumbing • ContractorForge</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-right">
                            <p class="font-bold text-gold-500">$850.00</p>
                            <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded">Paid</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-dark-600 cursor-pointer">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-green-500">🛒</span>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-medium">INV-2026-003</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">eBay Store Sales • MarketForge</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-right">
                            <p class="font-bold text-gold-500">$3,200.00</p>
                            <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 rounded">Overdue</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Payment Gateways -->
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Payment Gateways</h2>
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">💳</span>
                            <span class="font-medium">Stripe</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded">Connected</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">🅿️</span>
                            <span class="font-medium">PayPal</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded">Connected</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">🏦</span>
                            <span class="font-medium">ACH / Bank</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-green-500/20 text-green-400 rounded">Connected</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">⚡</span>
                            <span class="font-medium">Zelle</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 rounded">Manual</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span class="text-2xl">₿</span>
                            <span class="font-medium">Crypto</span>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400 rounded">Disabled</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <a href="/empirepay_gateways.html" class="block mt-4 text-center text-gold-500 text-sm hover:underline">Manage Gateways →</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Revenue by Module -->
        <div class="mt-8 bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
            <h2 class="text-lg font-bold mb-4">Revenue by Module (This Month)</h2>
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                        <span>✂️</span>
                        <span class="text-luxe-500 font-medium">LuxeForge</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-2xl font-bold">$12,500</p>
                    <div class="w-full bg-dark-600 rounded-full h-2 mt-2">
                        <div class="bg-luxe-500 h-2 rounded-full" style="width: 50%"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                        <span>🔧</span>
                        <span class="text-orange-500 font-medium">ContractorForge</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-2xl font-bold">$6,200</p>
                    <div class="w-full bg-dark-600 rounded-full h-2 mt-2">
                        <div class="bg-orange-500 h-2 rounded-full" style="width: 25%"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                        <span>🛒</span>
                        <span class="text-green-500 font-medium">MarketForge</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-2xl font-bold">$4,150</p>
                    <div class="w-full bg-dark-600 rounded-full h-2 mt-2">
                        <div class="bg-green-500 h-2 rounded-full" style="width: 17%"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                        <span>📜</span>
                        <span class="text-teal-500 font-medium">ApostApp</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-2xl font-bold">$2,000</p>
                    <div class="w-full bg-dark-600 rounded-full h-2 mt-2">
                        <div class="bg-teal-500 h-2 rounded-full" style="width: 8%"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>
</body>
</html>
EOF

## Copilot

Now let me create the EmpirePay Templates page - the central template library:

```bash
# Create EmpirePay Templates Library
cat > /tmp/empirepay_templates.html << 'EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpirePay - Invoice Templates</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' },
            luxe: { 500: '#8B4789' }
        }}}}
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">💳</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gold-500">EmpirePay</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Invoice Templates</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <a href="/" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg text-sm">🏠 EmpireBox</a>
        </div>
    </header>

    <!-- Sub Navigation -->
    <nav class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6">
            <div class="flex gap-1">
                <a href="/empirepay.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Dashboard</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_invoices.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Invoices</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_payments.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Payments</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_templates.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gold-500 border-b-2 border-gold-500 text-sm font-medium">Templates</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_gateways.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Payment Gateways</a>
                <a href="/empirepay_settings.html" class="px-4 py-3 text-gray-400 hover:text-white text-sm">Settings</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <main class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <!-- Template Categories -->
        <div class="flex gap-2 mb-6 flex-wrap">
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-gold-600 rounded-lg text-sm">All Templates</button>
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">Invoice</button>
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">Quote / Estimate</button>
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">Receipt</button>
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">Statement</button>
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">Work Order</button>
        </div>

        <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Invoice Templates</h2>
        <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-10">
            <!-- Professional Template -->
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group">
                <div class="aspect-[8.5/11] bg-white p-3 relative">
                    <div class="h-6 bg-gray-800 rounded-sm mb-2"></div>
                    <div class="flex justify-between mb-3">
                        <div class="space-y-1">
                            <div class="h-2 w-16 bg-gray-300 rounded"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 w-12 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="space-y-1 text-right">
                            <div class="h-2 w-14 bg-gray-300 rounded ml-auto"></div>
                            <div class="h-1 w-10 bg-gray-200 rounded ml-auto"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="space-y-1 mb-3">
                        <div class="h-3 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div>
                        <div class="h-2 w-full bg-gray-50 rounded"></div>
                        <div class="h-2 w-full bg-gray-50 rounded"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute bottom-3 right-3 text-right">
                        <div class="h-3 w-16 bg-gray-800 rounded"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                        <button onclick="previewTemplate('professional')" class="px-3 py-1 bg-white text-gray-900 rounded text-sm font-medium">Preview</button>
                        <button onclick="useTemplate('professional')" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gold-500 text-white rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="p-4">
                    <h3 class="font-bold">Professional</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Clean corporate look with dark header</p>
                    <div class="flex gap-1 mt-2">
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 rounded">Default</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Minimal Template -->
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group">
                <div class="aspect-[8.5/11] bg-white p-4 relative">
                    <div class="h-4 w-20 bg-gray-300 rounded mb-4"></div>
                    <div class="space-y-2 mb-4">
                        <div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div>
                        <div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div>
                        <div class="h-1 w-3/4 bg-gray-100 rounded"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute bottom-4 right-4">
                        <div class="h-6 w-20 bg-gray-200 rounded"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                        <button onclick="previewTemplate('minimal')" class="px-3 py-1 bg-white text-gray-900 rounded text-sm font-medium">Preview</button>
                        <button onclick="useTemplate('minimal')" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gold-500 text-white rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="p-4">
                    <h3 class="font-bold">Minimal</h3>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Simple, modern, elegant design</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Luxury Template -->
            <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group">
                <div class="aspect-[8.5/11] bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 to-gray-800 p-3 relative">

## Copilot

The Portainer password would have been set during initial setup. Let me check if there's a way to reset it or find it:

```bash
# Check if Portainer is running
docker ps | grep portainer

# Check Portainer data volume
docker volume ls | grep portainer

# If you need to reset the password, you can do:
echo ""
echo "To reset Portainer admin password, run:"
echo "docker container stop portainer"
echo "docker run --rm -v portainer_data:/data portainer/helper-reset-password"
echo "docker container start portainer"
```

## @r22gir

# Check if Portainer is running
docker ps | grep portainer

# Check Portainer data volume
docker volume ls | grep portainer

# If you need to reset the password, you can do:
echo ""
echo "To reset Portainer admin password, run:"
echo "docker container stop portainer"
echo "docker run --rm -v portainer_data:/data portainer/helper-reset-password"
echo "docker container start portainer"

## Copilot

It looks like Portainer isn't running yet. Let me set it up:

```bash
# Install Portainer
docker volume create portainer_data

docker run -d \
  -p 9000:9000 \
  -p 9443:9443 \
  --name portainer \
  --restart=always \
  -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
  -v portainer_data:/data \
  portainer/portainer-ce:latest

echo ""
echo "Portainer starting..."
sleep 5
docker ps | grep portainer

echo ""
echo "==================================="
echo "Portainer is now running!"
echo "Access: http://10.0.0.6:9000"
echo ""
echo "On FIRST login, you'll create your admin password."
echo "Username: admin"
echo "Password: (you choose - min 12 characters)"
echo "==================================="
```

## Copilot

Portainer is already running (`empirebox-portainer`). Go to **http://10.0.0.6:9000** in your browser.

If this is first time accessing it, you'll set your own admin password (minimum 12 characters).

If too much time passed since installation and it's asking you to restart:

```bash
# Restart Portainer to reset the initial setup timeout
docker restart empirebox-portainer

echo "Portainer restarted - go to http://10.0.0.6:9000 now"
```

Then quickly visit the URL and create your admin account before the 5-minute timeout expires.

            <!-- Workroom Quote -->
