```bash
                <div class="aspect-[8.5/11] bg-gradient-to-b from-luxe-500/20 to-white p-3 relative">
                    <div class="h-4 w-14 bg-luxe-500 rounded mx-auto mb-2"></div>
                    <div class="space-y-1"><div class="h-2 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-50 rounded"></div></div>
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                        <a href="/empirepay_preview.html?t=workroom_quote" class="px-3 py-2 bg-white text-gray-900 rounded text-sm font-medium">Preview</a>
                        <button class="px-3 py-2 bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="p-4">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <h3 class="font-bold">Workroom Quote</h3>
                        <span class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 bg-luxe-500/20 text-luxe-500 rounded">LuxeForge</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">Window treatment specs</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Custom -->
            <div class="template-card bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-dashed border-dark-600 cursor-pointer" onclick="createTemplate('quote')">
                <div class="aspect-[8.5/11] flex items-center justify-center">
                    <div class="text-center"><span class="text-4xl text-gray-600">+</span><p class="text-gray-500 mt-2">Create Custom</p></div>
                </div>
                <div class="p-4"><h3 class="font-bold text-gray-500">Custom Quote</h3><p class="text-sm text-gray-600">Build your own template</p></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- RECEIPT & WORK ORDER -->
        <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            <div>
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">🧾 Receipt Templates</h2>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div class="template-card bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group" data-type="receipt">
                        <div class="aspect-[3/4] bg-white p-2 relative">
                            <div class="text-center mb-2"><div class="h-3 w-12 bg-gray-800 rounded mx-auto"></div></div>
                            <div class="space-y-1"><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-200 rounded"></div><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="border-t border-dashed border-gray-300 mt-2 pt-2"><div class="h-2 w-10 bg-gray-800 rounded ml-auto"></div></div>
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center">
                                <button class="px-3 py-2 bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-3"><h3 class="font-bold text-sm">Simple Receipt</h3></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="template-card bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group" data-type="receipt">
                        <div class="aspect-[3/4] bg-white p-2 relative">
                            <div class="h-4 w-full bg-green-500 rounded mb-2"></div>
                            <div class="space-y-1"><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-200 rounded"></div><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2"><div class="h-3 w-full bg-green-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center">
                                <button class="px-3 py-2 bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-3"><h3 class="font-bold text-sm">Payment Receipt</h3></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div>
                <h2 class="text-xl font-bold mb-4">📋 Work Order Templates</h2>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div class="template-card bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group" data-type="workorder">
                        <div class="aspect-[3/4] bg-white p-2 relative">
                            <div class="h-4 w-full bg-orange-500 rounded mb-2"></div>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-1 mb-2"><div class="h-4 bg-gray-100 rounded"></div><div class="h-4 bg-gray-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="space-y-1"><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-200 rounded"></div><div class="h-1 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center">
                                <button class="px-3 py-2 bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-3">
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-sm">Service Work Order</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-orange-400">ContractorForge</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="template-card bg-dark-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group" data-type="workorder">
                        <div class="aspect-[3/4] bg-white p-2 relative">
                            <div class="h-3 w-16 bg-luxe-500 rounded mx-auto mb-2"></div>
                            <div class="space-y-1 mb-2"><div class="h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded"></div><div class="h-3 bg-gray-100 rounded"></div></div>
                            <div class="h-8 bg-gray-50 rounded border border-gray-200"></div>
                            <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition flex items-center justify-center">
                                <button class="px-3 py-2 bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm font-medium">Use</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-3">
                            <h3 class="font-bold text-sm">Workroom Order</h3>
                            <span class="text-xs text-luxe-500">LuxeForge</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        function filterTemplates(type) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
                btn.classList.remove('bg-gold-600');
                btn.classList.add('bg-dark-700');
            });
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('bg-gold-600');
            event.currentTarget.classList.remove('bg-dark-700');
            
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-card').forEach(card => {
                if (type === 'all' || card.dataset.type === type) {
                    card.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    card.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        }

        function useTemplate(name) {
            window.location.href = '/empirepay_invoice_new.html?template=' + name;
        }

        function createTemplate(type) {
            alert('Template builder coming soon!');
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
EOF
sudo cp /tmp/empirepay_templates.html /opt/empirebox/dashboard/empirepay_templates.html
echo "✅ Created EmpirePay Templates page"

echo ""
echo "=== EmpirePay Pages ==="
ls -la /opt/empirebox/dashboard/empirepay*.html
```

## Copilot

Now let me create the New Invoice page that uses these templates:

```bash
# Create EmpirePay New Invoice page
cat > /tmp/empirepay_invoice_new.html << 'EOF'
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>EmpirePay - New Invoice</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: {
            dark: { 700: '#374151', 800: '#1f2937', 900: '#111827', 950: '#0a0f1a' },
            gold: { 500: '#C9A84C', 600: '#A07A2E' },
            empire: { 500: '#8b5cf6', 600: '#7c3aed' },
            luxe: { 500: '#8B4789' }
        }}}}
    </script>
</head>
<body class="bg-dark-950 text-gray-100 min-h-screen">
    <header class="bg-dark-900 border-b border-dark-700">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                <span class="text-3xl">📝</span>
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gold-500">New Invoice</h1>
                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">EmpirePay</p>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <a href="/empirepay.html" class="px-4 py-2 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm">← Back</a>
                <a href="/" class="px-4 py-2 bg-empire-600 hover:bg-empire-500 rounded-lg text-sm">🏠 EmpireBox</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </header>

    <main class="max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <!-- Form -->
            <div class="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
                <!-- Source Module -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="font-bold mb-4">Source Module</h2>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                        <button onclick="selectModule('luxeforge')" class="module-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg text-center border-2 border-luxe-500">
                            <span class="text-2xl">✂️</span>
                            <p class="text-xs mt-1">LuxeForge</p>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="selectModule('contractorforge')" class="module-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg text-center border-2 border-transparent hover:border-orange-500">
                            <span class="text-2xl">🔧</span>
                            <p class="text-xs mt-1">ContractorForge</p>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="selectModule('marketforge')" class="module-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg text-center border-2 border-transparent hover:border-green-500">
                            <span class="text-2xl">🛒</span>
                            <p class="text-xs mt-1">MarketForge</p>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="selectModule('manual')" class="module-btn p-3 bg-dark-700 rounded-lg text-center border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gold-500">
                            <span class="text-2xl">✏️</span>
                            <p class="text-xs mt-1">Manual</p>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Customer Info -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 class="font-bold">Customer</h2>
                        <button class="text-gold-500 text-sm hover:underline">+ New Customer</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Customer / Company</label>
                            <select class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                                <option>Select customer...</option>
                                <option selected>Jane Cooper Design</option>
                                <option>ABC Plumbing Co</option>
                                <option>Modern Interiors LLC</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Email</label>
                            <input type="email" value="jane@cooperdesign.com" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Project Reference</label>
                            <select class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                                <option>Select project...</option>
                                <option selected>Smith Residence - Draperies</option>
                                <option>Luxury Condo - Window Treatments</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">PO Number (optional)</label>
                            <input type="text" placeholder="Customer PO#" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Invoice Details -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="font-bold mb-4">Invoice Details</h2>
                    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Invoice Number</label>
                            <input type="text" value="INV-2026-003" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Invoice Date</label>
                            <input type="date" value="2026-02-21" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Due Date</label>
                            <input type="date" value="2026-03-23" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Payment Terms</label>
                        <select class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg">
                            <option>Due on Receipt</option>
                            <option>Net 15</option>
                            <option selected>Net 30</option>
                            <option>Net 45</option>
                            <option>Net 60</option>
                            <option>Due on Completion</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Line Items -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 class="font-bold">Line Items</h2>
                        <button onclick="addLineItem()" class="px-3 py-1 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded text-sm">+ Add Item</button>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div id="line-items" class="space-y-4">
                        <!-- Item 1 -->
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-12 gap-3 items-end">
                                <div class="md:col-span-5">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Description</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="Pinch Pleat Drapery - Living Room (2 panels)" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Qty</label>
                                    <input type="number" value="2" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-center">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Rate</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$925.00" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-right">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Amount</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$1,850.00" readonly class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right text-gold-500 font-medium">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-1 text-center">
                                    <button class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-2">🗑️</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Item 2 -->
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-12 gap-3 items-end">
                                <div class="md:col-span-5">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Description</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="Pinch Pleat Drapery - Dining Room (2 panels)" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Qty</label>
                                    <input type="number" value="2" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-center">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Rate</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$1,100.00" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-right">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Amount</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$2,200.00" readonly class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right text-gold-500 font-medium">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-1 text-center">
                                    <button class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-2">🗑️</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Item 3 -->
                        <div class="bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-12 gap-3 items-end">
                                <div class="md:col-span-5">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Description</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="Professional Installation" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Qty</label>
                                    <input type="number" value="1" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-center">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Rate</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$350.00" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-right">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-2">
                                    <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Amount</label>
                                    <input type="text" value="$350.00" readonly class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right text-gold-500 font-medium">
                                </div>
                                <div class="md:col-span-1 text-center">
                                    <button class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-2">🗑️</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Notes -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="font-bold mb-4">Notes & Terms</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Notes to Customer</label>
                            <textarea rows="2" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm" placeholder="Thank you for your business!"></textarea>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Terms & Conditions</label>
                            <textarea rows="2" class="w-full p-3 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded-lg text-sm" placeholder="Payment is due within 30 days..."></textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Sidebar -->
            <div class="space-y-6">
                <!-- Template Selection -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
                        <h2 class="font-bold">Template</h2>
                        <a href="/empirepay_templates.html" class="text-gold-500 text-sm hover:underline">Browse All</a>
                    </div>
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                        <button onclick="selectTemplate('professional')" class="template-select p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded border-2 border-gold-500 text-center">
                            <div class="h-12 bg-white rounded mb-1"><div class="h-3 bg-gray-800 rounded-t"></div></div>
                            <p class="text-xs">Professional</p>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="selectTemplate('minimal')" class="template-select p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gray-500 text-center">
                            <div class="h-12 bg-white rounded mb-1 p-1"><div class="h-2 w-1/2 bg-gray-300 rounded"></div></div>
                            <p class="text-xs">Minimal</p>
                        </button>
                        <button onclick="selectTemplate('luxury')" class="template-select p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded border-2 border-transparent hover:border-gray-500 text-center">
                            <div class="h-12 bg-gray-900 rounded mb-1"><div class="h-1 bg-yellow-500"></div></div>
                            <p class="text-xs">Luxury</p>
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Totals -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="font-bold mb-4">Summary</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-3 text-sm">
                        <div class="flex justify-between">
                            <span class="text-gray-400">Subtotal</span>
                            <span>$4,400.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-gray-400">Discount</span>
                            <input type="text" value="$0.00" class="w-24 p-1 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right">
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-gray-400">Tax (0%)</span>
                            <input type="text" value="$0.00" class="w-24 p-1 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right">
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                            <span class="text-gray-400">Markup</span>
                            <input type="text" value="$450.00" class="w-24 p-1 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right">
                        </div>
                        <div class="border-t border-dark-600 pt-3 flex justify-between text-lg font-bold">
                            <span>Total</span>
                            <span class="text-gold-500">$4,850.00</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="flex justify-between items-center text-green-400">
                            <span>Deposit Paid</span>
                            <input type="text" value="-$2,425.00" class="w-24 p-1 bg-dark-700 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right text-green-400">
                        </div>
                        <div class="border-t border-dark-600 pt-3 flex justify-between text-xl font-bold">
                            <span>Balance Due</span>
                            <span class="text-gold-500">$2,425.00</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Payment Options -->
                <div class="bg-dark-800 rounded-xl p-6">
                    <h2 class="font-bold mb-4">Payment Options</h2>
                    <div class="space-y-2">
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" checked class="w-4 h-4">
                            <span class="text-sm">💳 Credit Card (Stripe)</span>
                        </label>
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" checked class="w-4 h-4">
                            <span class="text-sm">🅿️ PayPal</span>
                        </label>
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" class="w-4 h-4">
                            <span class="text-sm">🏦 ACH Bank Transfer</span>
                        </label>
                        <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 bg-dark-700 rounded cursor-pointer">
                            <input type="checkbox" checked class="w-4 h-4">
                            <span class="text-sm">⚡ Zelle (Manual)</span>
                        </label>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Actions -->
                <div class="space-y-3">
                    <button onclick="previewInvoice()" class="w-full py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 rounded-xl font-semibold">👁️ Preview Invoice</button>
                    <button onclick="saveAsDraft()" class="w-full py-3 bg-dark-700 hover:bg-dark-600 rounded-xl">💾 Save as Draft</button>
                    <button onclick="sendInvoice()" class="w-full py-3 bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 rounded-xl font-semibold">📧 Create & Send</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <script>
        let selectedModule = 'luxeforge';
        let selectedTemplate = 'professional';

        function selectModule(module) {
            selectedModule = module;
            document.querySelectorAll('.module-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-luxe-500', 'border-orange-500', 'border-green-500', 'border-gold-500'));
            const colors = { luxeforge: 'border-luxe-500', contractorforge: 'border-orange-500', marketforge: 'border-green-500', manual: 'border-gold-500' };
            event.currentTarget.classList.add(colors[module]);
        }

        function selectTemplate(template) {
            selectedTemplate = template;
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-select').forEach(btn => btn.classList.remove('border-gold-500'));
            event.currentTarget.classList.add('border-gold-500');
        }

        function addLineItem() {
            const container = document.getElementById('line-items');
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'bg-dark-700 rounded-lg p-4';
            item.innerHTML = `
                <div class="grid md:grid-cols-12 gap-3 items-end">
                    <div class="md:col-span-5">
                        <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Description</label>
                        <input type="text" placeholder="Item description" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm">
                    </div>
                    <div class="md:col-span-2">
                        <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Qty</label>
                        <input type="number" value="1" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-center">
                    </div>
                    <div class="md:col-span-2">
                        <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Rate</label>
                        <input type="text" value="$0.00" class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-600 border border-dark-500 rounded text-sm text-right">
                    </div>
                    <div class="md:col-span-2">
                        <label class="block text-xs text-gray-500 mb-1">Amount</label>
                        <input type="text" value="$0.00" readonly class="w-full p-2 bg-dark-800 border border-dark-600 rounded text-sm text-right text-gold-500 font-medium">
                    </div>
                    <div class="md:col-span-1 text-center">
                        <button onclick="this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.remove()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 p-2">🗑️</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            container.appendChild(item);
        }

        function previewInvoice() {
            window.open('/empirepay_preview.html?t=' + selectedTemplate, '_blank');
        }

        function saveAsDraft() {
            alert('Invoice saved as draft!');
        }

        function sendInvoice() {
            if(confirm('Send invoice to jane@cooperdesign.com?')) {
                alert('Invoice INV-2026-003 sent successfully!');
                window.location.href = '/empirepay.html';
            }
        }

        // Check URL for template param
        const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        if(params.get('template')) {
            selectTemplate(params.get('template'));
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
EOF
sudo cp /tmp/empirepay_invoice_new.html /opt/empirebox/dashboard/empirepay_invoice_new.html
echo "✅ Created EmpirePay New Invoice page"

echo ""
echo "=== Complete EmpirePay Module ==="
ls -la /opt/empirebox/dashboard/empirepay*.html
echo ""
echo "Test URLs:"
echo "  Dashboard:  http://10.0.0.6:8025/empirepay.html"
echo "  Templates:  http://10.0.0.6:8025/empirepay_templates.html"
echo "  New Invoice: http://10.0.0.6:8025/empirepay_invoice_new.html"
```

## @r22gir

telegram and open claw?

## Copilot

**OpenClaw** is an open-source AI assistant framework that integrates with Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord and more. Perfect for your **EmpireAssist** module!

Let's set it up:

```bash
# Install OpenClaw for EmpireAssist (Telegram bot)
cd /opt/empirebox

# Clone OpenClaw
git clone https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw.git
cd openclaw

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Create config directory
mkdir -p config

# Create Telegram config
cat > config/default.yaml << 'EOF'
# OpenClaw Configuration for EmpireAssist
server:
  port: 8120

channels:
  telegram:
    enabled: true
    botToken: "${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}"  # Set in .env
    dmPolicy: "pairing"  # pairing, open, or allowlist
    groups:
      "*":
        requireMention: true

# AI Model Settings
model:
  provider: "openai"  # or anthropic, local
  name: "gpt-4o"
  
# Web Search (optional)  
tools:
  webSearch:
    enabled: true
    provider: "firecrawl"  # or serper, tavily
EOF

echo "✅ OpenClaw installed"
echo ""
echo "NEXT STEPS:"
echo "1. Create a Telegram bot with @BotFather"
echo "2. Get your bot token"
echo "3. Add to .env file:"
echo "   TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=your-token-here"
echo "4. Run: npm start"
```

Want me to walk you through creating the Telegram bot with BotFather?

## Copilot

Yes, let's check the logs and system health:

```bash
# Check system logs for crash reasons
echo "=== Recent System Crashes/Errors ==="
sudo journalctl -p err -b --no-pager | tail -50

echo ""
echo "=== Kernel Messages (dmesg) ==="
sudo dmesg | tail -50

echo ""
echo "=== Memory Status ==="
free -h

echo ""
echo "=== Disk Space ==="
df -h

echo ""
echo "=== CPU Temperature ==="
sensors 2>/dev/null || cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone*/temp 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Top Processes by Memory ==="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== Docker Containers Running ==="
docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Size}}"

echo ""
echo "=== System Uptime ==="
uptime
```

## Copilot

Those errors look minor. Let's check for the real crash causes:

```bash
# Check for Out of Memory (OOM) kills - common crash cause
echo "=== OOM Killer Events ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "out of memory\|oom\|killed process"

echo ""
echo "=== Previous Boot Logs (if crashed) ==="
sudo journalctl -b -1 -p err --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || echo "No previous boot log"

echo ""
echo "=== Memory Status ==="
free -h

echo ""
echo "=== Swap Status ==="
swapon --show

echo ""
echo "=== Disk Space ==="
df -h /

echo ""
echo "=== CPU Temp ==="
cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone*/temp 2>/dev/null | while read temp; do echo "$((temp/1000))°C"; done

echo ""
echo "=== Top Memory Hogs ==="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Docker Memory Usage ==="
docker stats --no-stream --format "table {{.Name}}\t{{.MemUsage}}\t{{.CPUPerc}}"
```

## @r22gir

cant start portainer either

## Copilot

Let's check what's blocking Portainer and fix it:

```bash
# Check Portainer status
echo "=== Portainer Container Status ==="
docker ps -a | grep portainer

echo ""
echo "=== Portainer Logs ==="
docker logs empirebox-portainer --tail 30 2>&1 || docker logs portainer --tail 30 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== What's Using Port 9000 ==="
sudo lsof -i :9000

echo ""
echo "=== Try Restarting Portainer ==="
docker stop empirebox-portainer portainer 2>/dev/null
docker rm empirebox-portainer portainer 2>/dev/null
docker run -d \
  -p 9000:9000 \
  --name portainer \
  --restart=always \
  -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
  -v portainer_data:/data \
  portainer/portainer-ce:latest

echo ""
echo "=== Memory Check ==="
free -h

echo ""
echo "=== All Running Docker Containers ==="
docker ps
```

Good news - your system looks healthy:

| Check | Status |
|-------|--------|
| **Memory** | ✅ 21GB free of 27GB |
| **Swap** | ✅ 8GB available, 0 used |
| **Disk** | ✅ 409GB free (6% used) |

**Portainer IS running:**
```
empirebox-portainer   87.59MiB / 27.31GiB   0.02%
```

Try accessing it now: **http://10.0.0.6:9000**

If browser won't connect, check the port:

```bash
# Verify Portainer is listening
sudo lsof -i :9000

# Check if firewall is blocking
sudo ufw status

# Test locally
curl -I http://localhost:9000
```

The crashes might be from the **IOMMU error** you're seeing:
```
AMD-Vi: Event logged [INVALID_DEVICE_REQUEST device=0000:00:01.4...]
```

This is a known AMD bug. We can disable it if crashes continue:

```bash
# Check current boot parameters
cat /proc/cmdline
```

What does the crash look like - full system freeze? Black screen? Reboot?

## @r22gir

still cant log in

## Copilot

Let's reset the Portainer password:

```bash
# Stop Portainer
docker stop empirebox-portainer

# Reset the admin password
docker run --rm -v portainer_data:/data portainer/helper-reset-password

# Start Portainer again
docker start empirebox-portainer

echo ""
echo "Now go to http://10.0.0.6:9000"
echo "Login with:"

echo "  Password: (shown above from reset)"
```

## Copilot

The Portainer database is in a different volume. Let's find it:

```bash
# Find the correct volume
docker inspect empirebox-portainer | grep -A5 "Mounts"

# List all portainer volumes
docker volume ls | grep portainer

# Check what volume empirebox-portainer uses
docker inspect empirebox-portainer --format '{{range .Mounts}}{{.Name}} -> {{.Destination}}{{"\n"}}{{end}}'
```

## Copilot

Found it! The volume is `empirebox_portainer_data`, not `portainer_data`. Let's reset with the correct volume:

```bash
# Stop Portainer
docker stop empirebox-portainer

# Reset with correct volume
docker run --rm -v empirebox_portainer_data:/data portainer/helper-reset-password

# Start Portainer
docker start empirebox-portainer

echo ""
echo "Now go to http://10.0.0.6:9000"
```

## Copilot

Let's dig deeper into what's causing the crashes:

```bash
# Check for hardware errors
echo "=== Hardware Errors ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "error\|fail\|fault" | tail -30

echo ""
echo "=== AMD IOMMU Errors (your main error) ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "iommu\|amd-vi" | tail -20

echo ""
echo "=== USB/Power Issues ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "usb\|power\|overcurrent" | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== GPU/Display Errors ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "gpu\|drm\|display\|amdgpu" | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== System Crash History ==="
sudo journalctl --list-boots | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Last Shutdown Reason ==="
last -x shutdown reboot | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Any Core Dumps? ==="
ls -la /var/crash/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No crash dir"
coredumpctl list 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || echo "No coredumps"
```

This will show us:
- Hardware errors (memory, disk, etc.)
- That AMD IOMMU issue you're seeing
- USB/power problems (common with mini PCs)
- GPU issues
- How many times it's crashed/rebooted
- Any crash dumps

## Copilot

Found the issues! You've had **21+ reboots today** and there's a crash file.

```bash
# Check the docker-compose crash
echo "=== Docker Compose Crash Details ==="
sudo cat /var/crash/_usr_bin_docker-compose.1000.crash | head -100

echo ""
echo "=== Check what happened right before last crashes ==="
sudo journalctl -b -2 --no-pager | tail -50

echo ""
echo "=== IOMMU Fix - This is likely your culprit ==="
echo "The AMD-Vi INVALID_DEVICE_REQUEST error can cause freezes"
echo ""
echo "Current boot params:"
cat /proc/cmdline
```

The **AMD IOMMU error** on device `0000:00:01.4` is a known issue that causes random freezes on AMD systems. We can add a kernel parameter to fix it.

After we see the output, we'll likely need to:
```bash
# Add iommu=soft or amd_iommu=off to GRUB
sudo nano /etc/default/grub
# Add to GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT: "iommu=soft" or "amd_iommu=off"
sudo update-grub
```

Let's see the crash details first.

=== IOMMU Fix - This is likely your culprit ===
The AMD-Vi INVALID_DEVICE_REQUEST error can cause freezes

Current boot params:
BOOT_IMAGE=/boot/vmlinuz-6.17.0-14-generic root=UUID=a0e914e1-fa97-42f0-9f92-1dbf163a2971 ro quiet splash vt.handoff=7
rg@EmpireBox:~$ 


## Copilot

Found the issues! Two main culprits:

1. **AMD IOMMU error** - known to cause freezes on mini PCs
2. **Firefox Snap** spamming errors every 5 seconds (annoying but not the crash cause)

Let's fix the IOMMU issue:

```bash
# Backup and edit GRUB
sudo cp /etc/default/grub /etc/default/grub.backup

# Add iommu=soft to fix AMD-Vi errors
sudo sed -i 's/GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="quiet splash"/GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT="quiet splash iommu=soft"/' /etc/default/grub

# Verify the change
echo "=== Updated GRUB config ==="
grep GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT /etc/default/grub

# Update GRUB
sudo update-grub

echo ""
echo "=== IOMMU fix applied ==="
echo "Reboot required for change to take effect."
echo ""
echo "Also cleaning up the Firefox spam..."
```

After reboot, the AMD IOMMU errors should stop.

**Optional:** Replace Firefox Snap with the regular .deb version (Snap Firefox is known to be buggy):

```bash
# Remove Firefox Snap and install regular version (optional - do after reboot)
# sudo snap remove firefox
# sudo add-apt-repository ppa:mozillateam/ppa
# sudo apt install firefox
```

Want to apply the IOMMU fix and reboot?

## Copilot

IOMMU fix applied. Now reboot to activate it:

```bash
sudo reboot
```

After reboot, verify the fix worked:

```bash
# Check new boot params include iommu=soft
cat /proc/cmdline

# Check for IOMMU errors (should be none or fewer)
sudo dmesg | grep -i "amd-vi\|iommu" | grep -i error
```

The system should be more stable now. Let me know how it goes after the reboot!

## Copilot

`iommu=soft` is now active and **no IOMMU errors** returned! 🎉

The fix is working. Let's do a quick health check:

```bash
echo "=== System Health Check ==="
echo ""
echo "Uptime:"
uptime

echo ""
echo "Memory:"
free -h

echo ""
echo "Docker containers:"
docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}" | head -15

echo ""
echo "Any errors this boot?"
sudo dmesg | grep -i "error\|fail" | grep -v "default\|RAS" | wc -l
```

Monitor it for a while - the crashes should stop now. If you want, we can also fix that Firefox Snap spam later by switching to the regular Firefox.

Ready to continue with OpenClaw/Telegram when you are!

## Copilot

Those are harmless! Just ACPI/BIOS quirks - the system is trying to call some device functions that don't exist on your hardware. Won't cause crashes.

**Summary:**
| Issue | Status |
|-------|--------|
| ❌ AMD IOMMU crashes | ✅ **FIXED** |
| ⚠️ ACPI _DSM warnings | ✅ Harmless, ignore |

Your system should be stable now. 🎉

## Copilot

Let's dig deeper:

```bash
# Check what happened right before this crash
echo "=== Previous Boot (the crash) ==="
sudo journalctl -b -1 --no-pager | tail -100

echo ""
echo "=== All Errors from Crashed Boot ==="
sudo journalctl -b -1 -p err --no-pager

echo ""
echo "=== Kernel Panic or OOM? ==="
sudo journalctl -b -1 | grep -i "panic\|oom\|killed\|segfault\|watchdog"

echo ""
echo "=== Current Boot Errors ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "error\|fail\|fault" | grep -v "default\|RAS\|_DSM"

echo ""
echo "=== GPU/Display Issues? ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "amdgpu\|drm" | grep -i "error\|fail\|hang\|reset"

echo ""
echo "=== Temperature Right Now ==="
sensors 2>/dev/null || cat /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone*/temp
```

rg@EmpireBox:~$ 


## Copilot

Found it! The **IOMMU error is still happening** even with `iommu=soft`:

```
Feb 20 23:58:43 EmpireBox kernel: iommu ivhd0: AMD-Vi: Event logged [INVALID_DEVICE_REQUEST device=0000:00:01.4 pasid=0x00000 address=0xfffffffdf8000000 flags=0x0a00]
```

Also spotted: **GPU did a MODE2 reset** - this could be causing freezes.

Let's try a stronger fix - disable AMD IOMMU completely:

```bash
# Check current params
cat /proc/cmdline

# Update GRUB with stronger IOMMU disable
sudo sed -i 's/iommu=soft/amd_iommu=off iommu=pt/g' /etc/default/grub

# Verify
grep GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT /etc/default/grub

# Update GRUB
sudo update-grub
```

Then after reboot, if still crashing, we may need to address the GPU issue too:

```bash
# Check what device 00:01.4 is (the problem device)
lspci -s 00:01.4 -v
```

Let's see what that device is - it might give us a clue.

## Copilot

Good. Now let's check what that problem device is before rebooting:

```bash
# What is device 00:01.4?
lspci -s 00:01.4 -v

# Check GPU status
lspci | grep -i vga

# Also check BIOS version (sometimes needs update)
sudo dmidecode -s bios-version
```

Then reboot:

```bash
sudo reboot
```

After reboot, verify:

```bash
cat /proc/cmdline
sudo dmesg | grep -i "amd-vi\|iommu" | head -10
```

mpireBox:~$ # What is device 00:01.4?
lspci -s 00:01.4 -v

# Check GPU status

# Also check BIOS version (sometimes needs update)

05:00.0 VGA compatible controller: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI] Barcelo (rev c1)
FP656V509
rg@EmpireBox:~$ 


## Copilot

Interesting - device `00:01.4` returned nothing, meaning it's a phantom/internal device causing the IOMMU error. That's common with AMD APUs.

Your setup:
- **GPU:** AMD Barcelo (integrated APU graphics)
- **BIOS:** FP656V509

Let's reboot with the new IOMMU settings:

```bash
sudo reboot
```

After it comes back up, run this to verify:

```bash
# Verify new boot params
echo "=== Boot Params ==="
cat /proc/cmdline

echo ""
echo "=== IOMMU Status ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "amd-vi\|iommu" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== Any Errors? ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "error\|fail" | grep -v "default\|RAS\|_DSM" | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== GPU Status ==="
sudo dmesg | grep -i "amdgpu" | grep -i "error\|reset\|hang"
```

If it still crashes, we might need to:
1. Update BIOS (check manufacturer website)
2. Add GPU-specific kernel param: `amdgpu.reset_method=4`

## Copilot

Much better!

| Check | Status |
|-------|--------|
| **amd_iommu=off** | ✅ Active |
| **iommu=pt** | ✅ Passthrough mode |
| **IOMMU Errors** | ✅ **NONE!** |
| **Other Errors** | ✅ **NONE!** |

The only thing left is the **GPU MODE2 reset** at boot - that's normal for AMD APUs during initialization, not a crash.

Your system should be stable now. Let it run for a while and see if it holds.

---

**Quick summary of what we fixed:**
1. ~~AMD-Vi INVALID_DEVICE_REQUEST~~ → Fixed with `amd_iommu=off iommu=pt`
2. Portainer login → Reset password

Monitor for the next hour or so. If no crashes, you're good! 🎉

Ready to continue with **OpenClaw/Telegram** when you are.

## Copilot

EmpireAssist is running but needs the Telegram/OpenClaw integration. Let's set it up:

```bash
# Find where EmpireAssist actually lives
echo "=== Find EmpireAssist files ==="
docker inspect empirebox-empireassist --format '{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}} -> {{.Destination}}{{"\n"}}{{end}}'

echo ""
echo "=== Check what's in the container ==="
docker exec empirebox-empireassist ls -la /app/

echo ""
echo "=== Current main.py ==="
docker exec empirebox-empireassist cat /app/main.py 2>/dev/null || docker exec empirebox-empireassist cat /app/app/main.py 2>/dev/null
```

Then we need:
1. Your **Telegram Bot Token** (from @BotFather)
2. **Ollama** is already running for OpenClaw

Do you have a Telegram bot token, or do we need to create one?

## @r22gir

describe empire assist as you understand it

## Copilot

Based on what I've seen so far, here's my understanding of **EmpireAssist**:

---

## EmpireAssist

**What it is:** Your AI-powered personal assistant for the EmpireBox ecosystem.

**Current State:**
- Running as a Docker container on port **8120**
- Basic FastAPI/Uvicorn setup
- No persistent files on disk (runs from container image)
- No Telegram integration yet
- No AI/LLM connection yet

---

**What it SHOULD be:**

| Feature | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **Telegram Bot** | Chat interface - message your assistant from anywhere |
| **OpenClaw Integration** | Local AI brain using Ollama (no cloud APIs needed) |
| **EmpireBox Awareness** | Knows about all your modules (ForgeCRM, LeadForge, etc.) |
| **Command Execution** | Can check status, restart services, pull reports |
| **Voice/Text** | Natural conversation to manage your business empire |

---

**The Vision (as I understand it):**

You message EmpireAssist on Telegram:
> "How many leads came in today?"

It queries LeadForge via API, processes with OpenClaw, responds:
> "You had 12 new leads today. 3 from Facebook, 9 from the website. Want me to send the details?"

Or:
> "Restart the CRM"

And it actually does it.

---

**Is this accurate? What else should EmpireAssist do?**

## @r22gir

empire assist different form Support forge correct?

## Copilot

Yes, they're different:

| | **EmpireAssist** | **SupportForge** |
|---|---|---|
| **For** | YOU (the owner) | Your CUSTOMERS |
| **Purpose** | Personal AI assistant to manage your empire | Customer support ticketing system |
| **Interface** | Telegram bot (private) | Web portal / email (public-facing) |
| **AI Role** | Helps YOU run the business | Helps customers get answers |
| **Examples** | "Show me today's revenue" | "Where's my order?" |
| | "Restart the CRM" | "How do I reset my password?" |
| | "How many leads this week?" | "I need a refund" |

---

**SupportForge** = Customer-facing helpdesk (like Zendesk/Freshdesk)

**EmpireAssist** = Your private command center AI (like having a personal Jarvis)

---

Is that how you see them too, or do you want them to overlap in some way?

## @r22gir

8583349557:AAFc6dmna_htmcLbUvG762cI4iEuWMC-MXc

## Copilot

Got it. Let's configure EmpireAssist with Telegram + Ollama:

```bash
# Create EmpireAssist directory
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/empireassist

# Create .env file with your credentials
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist/.env << 'EOF'
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=8583349557:AAFc6dmna_htmcLbUvG762cI4iEuWMC-MXc
OLLAMA_HOST=http://host.docker.internal:11434
OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3
EOF

# Check what image EmpireAssist is using
docker inspect empirebox-empireassist --format '{{.Config.Image}}'

echo ""
echo "=== Check if Ollama is running ==="
curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags | head -5 || echo "Ollama not running"

echo ""
echo "=== Check container's current env vars ==="
```

"""
Main FastAPI application entry point for EmpireBox backend.
"""
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
import os

# Create FastAPI app
app = FastAPI(
    title="EmpireBox API",
    description="Backend API for EmpireBox - Setup Portal, License Management, ShipForge, MarketF, SupportForge, Economic Intelligence, and AI-powered marketplace automation",
    version="1.0.0",
    docs_url="/docs",
    redoc_url="/redoc"
)

# Get CORS origins from environment or use default
cors_origins = os.getenv("CORS_ORIGINS", "*").split(",")

# Configure CORS
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=cors_origins if cors_origins != ["*"] else ["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)

# Import routers with error handling for missing modules
try:
    from app.routers import licenses
    app.include_router(licenses.router, prefix="/licenses", tags=["licenses"])
except ImportError:
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import shipping
    app.include_router(shipping.router, prefix="/shipping", tags=["shipping"])
except ImportError:
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import preorders
    app.include_router(preorders.router, prefix="/preorders", tags=["preorders"])
except ImportError:
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import auth
    if auth:
        app.include_router(auth.router, prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import users
    if users:
        app.include_router(users.router, prefix="/users", tags=["users"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import listings
    if listings:
        app.include_router(listings.router, prefix="/listings", tags=["listings"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import messages
    if messages:
        app.include_router(messages.router, prefix="/messages", tags=["messages"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import marketplaces
    if marketplaces:
        app.include_router(marketplaces.router, prefix="/marketplaces", tags=["marketplaces"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import webhooks
    if webhooks:
        app.include_router(webhooks.router, prefix="/webhooks", tags=["webhooks"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import ai
    if ai:
        app.include_router(ai.router, prefix="/ai", tags=["ai"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

# SupportForge routers
try:
    from app.routers import supportforge_tickets
    app.include_router(supportforge_tickets.router, prefix="/api/v1/tickets", tags=["supportforge-tickets"])
except ImportError:
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import supportforge_customers
    app.include_router(supportforge_customers.router, prefix="/api/v1/customers", tags=["supportforge-customers"])
except ImportError:
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import supportforge_kb
    app.include_router(supportforge_kb.router, prefix="/api/v1/kb", tags=["supportforge-kb"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

try:
    from app.routers import supportforge_ai
    app.include_router(supportforge_ai.router, prefix="/api/v1/ai", tags=["supportforge-ai"])
except (ImportError, AttributeError):
    pass

# MarketF routers
try:
    from app.routers.marketplace import products, orders, reviews, seller
    app.include_router(products.router, prefix="/marketplace", tags=["marketplace-products"])
    app.include_router(orders.router, prefix="/marketplace", tags=["marketplace-orders"])
    app.include_router(reviews.router, prefix="/marketplace", tags=["marketplace-reviews"])
    app.include_router(seller.router, prefix="/marketplace", tags=["marketplace-seller"])
except ImportError:
    pass

# Economic Intelligence router
try:
    from app.routers import economic
    app.include_router(economic.router, prefix="/api/v1/economic", tags=["economic"])
except ImportError:
    pass

# Chat Backup and Decision Context router
try:
    from app.routers import chat_backup
    app.include_router(chat_backup.router, prefix="/api/v1/chat-backup", tags=["chat-backup"])
except ImportError:
    pass


@app.get("/")
async def root():
    """Root endpoint - API info."""
    return {
        "message": "EmpireBox API",
        "version": "1.0.0",
        "status": "operational",
        "marketplace_fee": "8%",
        "endpoints": {
            "licenses": "/licenses",
            "shipping": "/shipping",
            "preorders": "/preorders",
            "auth": "/auth",
            "users": "/users",
            "listings": "/listings",
            "messages": "/messages",
            "marketplaces": "/marketplaces",
            "webhooks": "/webhooks",
            "ai": "/ai",
            "marketplace_products": "/marketplace/products",
            "marketplace_orders": "/marketplace/orders",
            "marketplace_reviews": "/marketplace/reviews",
            "marketplace_seller": "/marketplace/seller",
            "supportforge_tickets": "/api/v1/tickets",
            "supportforge_customers": "/api/v1/customers",
            "supportforge_kb": "/api/v1/kb",
            "supportforge_ai": "/api/v1/ai",
            "economic": "/api/v1/economic",
            "chat_backup": "/api/v1/chat-backup"
        }
    }


@app.get("/health")
async def health():
    """Health check endpoint."""
    return {
        "status": "healthy",
        "service": "empirebox-backend"
    }


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)rg@EmpireBox:~$

## Copilot

Here's the Telegram bot for EmpireAssist:

```bash
# Create bot directory
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot

# Create the bot code
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/bot.py << 'EOF'
import os
import asyncio
import httpx
from telegram import Update
from telegram.ext import Application, CommandHandler, MessageHandler, filters, ContextTypes

# Config
TELEGRAM_TOKEN = os.getenv("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN")
OLLAMA_HOST = os.getenv("OLLAMA_HOST", "http://host.docker.internal:11434")
OLLAMA_MODEL = os.getenv("OLLAMA_MODEL", "llama3")
ALLOWED_USERS = os.getenv("ALLOWED_USERS", "").split(",")  # Your Telegram user ID(s)

SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are EmpireAssist, a helpful AI assistant for managing EmpireBox.
EmpireBox is a business management platform with these modules:
- ForgeCRM: Customer relationship management
- LeadForge: Lead generation and tracking
- SupportForge: Customer support tickets
- ShipForge: Shipping and logistics
- MarketForge: Marketplace management
- LuxeForge: Premium/luxury inventory
- SocialForge: Social media management
- EmpirePay: Payment processing
- ContractorForge: Contractor management
- WorkRoom: Project workspace

Be concise, helpful, and professional. You're talking to the business owner."""

async def query_ollama(prompt: str, context: str = "") -> str:
    """Query Ollama for AI response."""
    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=120.0) as client:
            response = await client.post(
                f"{OLLAMA_HOST}/api/generate",
                json={
                    "model": OLLAMA_MODEL,
                    "prompt": f"{SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\nContext: {context}\n\nUser: {prompt}\n\nAssistant:",
                    "stream": False
                }
            )
            if response.status_code == 200:
                return response.json().get("response", "No response from AI")
            return f"Ollama error: {response.status_code}"
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error connecting to Ollama: {e}"

async def start(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    """Handle /start command."""
    user_id = str(update.effective_user.id)
    await update.message.reply_text(
        f"👋 Welcome to EmpireAssist!\n\n"
        f"I'm your AI assistant for managing EmpireBox.\n"
        f"Your user ID: {user_id}\n\n"
        f"Commands:\n"
        f"/status - Check EmpireBox services\n"
        f"/help - Show help\n\n"
        f"Or just message me naturally!"
    )

async def status(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    """Check EmpireBox service status."""
    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=10.0) as client:
            services = {
                "EmpireAssist API": "http://host.docker.internal:8120/health",
                "SupportForge": "http://host.docker.internal:8107/health",
                "ForgeCRM": "http://host.docker.internal:8104/health",
            }
            status_lines = ["📊 **EmpireBox Status**\n"]
            for name, url in services.items():
                try:
                    r = await client.get(url)
                    status_lines.append(f"✅ {name}: Online")
                except:
                    status_lines.append(f"❌ {name}: Offline")
            await update.message.reply_text("\n".join(status_lines))
    except Exception as e:
        await update.message.reply_text(f"Error checking status: {e}")

async def help_cmd(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    """Handle /help command."""
    await update.message.reply_text(
        "🤖 **EmpireAssist Help**\n\n"
        "I can help you manage your EmpireBox:\n\n"
        "• Ask about your business\n"
        "• Check service status\n"
        "• Get reports and summaries\n"
        "• Manage modules\n\n"
        "Just type naturally - I understand!"
    )

async def handle_message(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    """Handle regular messages with AI."""
    user_id = str(update.effective_user.id)
    
    # Optional: restrict to allowed users
    # if ALLOWED_USERS[0] and user_id not in ALLOWED_USERS:
    #     await update.message.reply_text("Unauthorized. Contact admin.")
    #     return
    
    await update.message.chat.send_action("typing")
    
    user_message = update.message.text
    response = await query_ollama(user_message)
    
    # Split long messages (Telegram limit is 4096)
    if len(response) > 4000:
        for i in range(0, len(response), 4000):
            await update.message.reply_text(response[i:i+4000])
    else:
        await update.message.reply_text(response)

def main():
    """Start the bot."""
    if not TELEGRAM_TOKEN:
        print("ERROR: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not set!")
        return
    
    print(f"Starting EmpireAssist Bot...")
    print(f"Ollama: {OLLAMA_HOST} ({OLLAMA_MODEL})")
    
    app = Application.builder().token(TELEGRAM_TOKEN).build()
    
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("start", start))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("status", status))
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("help", help_cmd))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(filters.TEXT & ~filters.COMMAND, handle_message))
    
    print("Bot is running!")
    app.run_polling(allowed_updates=Update.ALL_TYPES)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
EOF

# Create requirements
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/requirements.txt << 'EOF'
python-telegram-bot==20.7
httpx==0.25.2
EOF

# Create Dockerfile
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/Dockerfile << 'EOF'
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY bot.py .
CMD ["python", "bot.py"]
EOF

echo "✅ Bot files created!"
ls -la /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/
```

Once Ollama finishes downloading, we'll build and run this container.

The bot directory wasn't created. Let's do it now:

```bash
# Create everything in one go
sudo mkdir -p /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot

# Create bot.py
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/bot.py << 'EOF'
import os
import asyncio
import httpx
from telegram import Update
from telegram.ext import Application, CommandHandler, MessageHandler, filters, ContextTypes

TELEGRAM_TOKEN = os.getenv("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN")
OLLAMA_HOST = os.getenv("OLLAMA_HOST", "http://host.docker.internal:11434")
OLLAMA_MODEL = os.getenv("OLLAMA_MODEL", "llama3")

SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are EmpireAssist, a helpful AI assistant for managing EmpireBox.
Be concise, helpful, and professional. You're talking to the business owner."""

async def query_ollama(prompt: str) -> str:
    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=120.0) as client:
            response = await client.post(
                f"{OLLAMA_HOST}/api/generate",
                json={"model": OLLAMA_MODEL, "prompt": f"{SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\nUser: {prompt}\n\nAssistant:", "stream": False}
            )
            if response.status_code == 200:
                return response.json().get("response", "No response")
            return f"Ollama error: {response.status_code}"
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error: {e}"

async def start(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    await update.message.reply_text(f"👋 EmpireAssist ready!\nYour ID: {update.effective_user.id}\n\nJust message me!")

async def handle_message(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    await update.message.chat.send_action("typing")
    response = await query_ollama(update.message.text)
    await update.message.reply_text(response[:4000])

def main():
    if not TELEGRAM_TOKEN:
        print("ERROR: No token!")
        return
    print(f"Starting bot with Ollama: {OLLAMA_HOST}")
    app = Application.builder().token(TELEGRAM_TOKEN).build()
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("start", start))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(filters.TEXT & ~filters.COMMAND, handle_message))
    app.run_polling()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
EOF

# Create requirements.txt
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/requirements.txt << 'EOF'
python-telegram-bot==20.7
httpx==0.25.2
EOF

# Create Dockerfile
sudo tee /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot/Dockerfile << 'EOF'
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY bot.py .
CMD ["python", "bot.py"]
EOF

# Build it
cd /opt/empirebox/empireassist-bot
sudo docker build -t empirebox/empireassist-bot:latest .
```

import os
import asyncio
import httpx
from telegram import Update
from telegram.ext import Application, CommandHandler, MessageHandler, filters, ContextTypes

TELEGRAM_TOKEN = os.getenv("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN")
OLLAMA_HOST = os.getenv("OLLAMA_HOST", "http://host.docker.internal:11434")
OLLAMA_MODEL = os.getenv("OLLAMA_MODEL", "llama3")

SYSTEM_PROMPT = """You are EmpireAssist, a helpful AI assistant for managing EmpireBox.
Be concise, helpful, and professional. You're talking to the business owner."""

async def query_ollama(prompt: str) -> str:
    try:
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=120.0) as client:
            response = await client.post(
                f"{OLLAMA_HOST}/api/generate",
                json={"model": OLLAMA_MODEL, "prompt": f"{SYSTEM_PROMPT}\n\nUser: {prompt}\n\nAssistant:", "stream": False}
            )
            if response.status_code == 200:
                return response.json().get("response", "No response")
            return f"Ollama error: {response.status_code}"
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error: {e}"

async def start(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    await update.message.reply_text(f"👋 EmpireAssist ready!\nYour ID: {update.effective_user.id}\n\nJust message me!")

async def handle_message(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    await update.message.chat.send_action("typing")
    response = await query_ollama(update.message.text)
    await update.message.reply_text(response[:4000])

def main():
    if not TELEGRAM_TOKEN:
        print("ERROR: No token!")
        return
    print(f"Starting bot with Ollama: {OLLAMA_HOST}")
    app = Application.builder().token(TELEGRAM_TOKEN).build()
    app.add_handler(CommandHandler("start", start))
    app.add_handler(MessageHandler(filters.TEXT & ~filters.COMMAND, handle_message))
    app.run_polling()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

## @r22gir

is olama list the better option for local Ai agents?

## Copilot

Good question. Here's the landscape:

| Option | Pros | Cons | Best For |
|--------|------|------|----------|
| **Ollama** | Easy setup, good model library, fast | Limited to chat models | Quick local AI, what we're using |
| **LocalAI** | OpenAI-compatible API, more models | More complex setup | Drop-in OpenAI replacement |
| **LM Studio** | Great GUI, easy model management | Desktop app, not headless | Testing models locally |
| **vLLM** | Very fast inference, production-ready | Needs GPU, complex | High-performance serving |
| **text-generation-webui** | Tons of features, flexible | Heavy, complex | Power users/tinkering |

---

**For EmpireBox, Ollama is solid because:**
- ✅ Simple API (`/api/generate`)
- ✅ Runs headless on server
- ✅ Easy model switching (`ollama pull`)
- ✅ Low resource overhead
- ✅ Works with your AMD APU

---

**If you want MORE later:**
- **Multiple agents** → Look at **CrewAI** or **AutoGen** (they can use Ollama as backend)
- **OpenAI compatibility** → **LocalAI** wraps models with OpenAI API
- **Function calling/tools** → Ollama supports this with newer models

---

For now, **Ollama + llama3** is the right choice. We can evolve later.

Is llama3 downloaded yet? Check:

```bash
ollama list
```

## @r22gir

are there buttons to choose if olama will be used or the API for another model?

## Copilot

Not yet - but great idea! We can add that.

**Options to give you flexibility:**

1. **Telegram inline buttons** - Choose AI before each message
2. **Commands** - `/useollama`, `/useopenai`, `/useclaude`
3. **Config setting** - Set default in admin panel
4. **Auto-fallback** - Try Ollama first, fall back to cloud if slow/down

---

**Quick example - add to the bot:**

```python
# User picks AI with buttons
async def settings(update: Update, context: ContextTypes.DEFAULT_TYPE):
    keyboard = [
        [InlineKeyboardButton("🦙 Ollama (Local)", callback_data="ai_ollama")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton("🤖 OpenAI GPT-4", callback_data="ai_openai")],
        [InlineKeyboardButton("🧠 Claude", callback_data="ai_claude")],
    ]
    await update.message.reply_text("Choose AI:", reply_markup=InlineKeyboardMarkup(keyboard))
```

---

**Want me to add this now?** We can update the bot to support:
- Ollama (free, local, private)
- OpenAI (fast, smart, costs $)
- Claude (great reasoning, costs $)

Just need your API keys if you want cloud options. Or we can add the buttons now and configure keys later.

## @r22gir

benefits of this approach?

## Copilot

**Benefits of multi-AI selector:**

| Benefit | Example |
|---------|---------|
| **Cost control** | Use free Ollama for simple stuff, paid API for complex tasks |
| **Speed choice** | Ollama = private but slower, GPT-4 = fast but cloud |
| **Fallback** | If Ollama is down/slow, switch to cloud instantly |
| **Best tool for job** | Claude for writing, GPT-4 for code, Ollama for private data |
| **Privacy when needed** | Sensitive business data → Ollama (stays local) |
| **Testing** | Compare answers from different AIs |

---

**Real scenarios:**

> "Summarize my sales this month"  
→ **Ollama** (your data stays local)

> "Write a marketing email for my product"  
→ **Claude** (better writing)

> "Debug this code error"  
→ **GPT-4** (faster, better at code)

> "What should I price this item at?"  
→ **Ollama** (competitor data stays private)

---

**Downside:**
- More complexity
- Need API keys + pay for cloud usage

---

**My recommendation:** 
Start with **Ollama only** now. Add cloud options later when you hit limits.

Let's get the bot working first. Is Ollama done downloading?

```bash
ollama list
```

## @r22gir

open claw has the option to select API. but can we have the switch automatic and manual? is there any guidance on this?

## Copilot

Smart thinking. Yes - **automatic + manual override** is the best approach.

---

**How it would work:**

| Mode | How it decides |
|------|----------------|
| **Auto (default)** | Bot picks best AI based on rules |
| **Manual override** | You force a specific AI with `/use ollama` or button |

---

**Auto-routing rules (examples):**

```
IF message contains sensitive keywords (revenue, customer names, passwords)
   → Use Ollama (local/private)

IF message is complex reasoning or long-form writing
   → Use Claude

IF message is code-related
   → Use GPT-4

IF Ollama response time > 30 seconds
   → Fallback to cloud

IF cloud API is down or rate-limited
   → Fallback to Ollama

DEFAULT → Ollama (free + private)
```

---

**Manual override:**
- `/auto` - Let bot decide (default)
- `/local` - Force Ollama
- `/cloud` - Force best cloud AI
- `/gpt4` - Force GPT-4
- `/claude` - Force Claude

---

**Guidance?**

There's no single standard, but this pattern is called **"AI routing"** or **"model routing"**. Projects like:
- **OpenRouter** - routes to cheapest/best model
- **LiteLLM** - unified API with fallbacks
- **Martian** - auto-selects model by task

We can build a simple version into EmpireAssist.

---

**Want me to build this after we get basic bot working?**

First priority: get Ollama + Telegram working. Then add smart routing.

Is the download done?

```bash
ollama list
```

## @r22gir

why workroom and luxeforge two separate modules? it should be that way?

## Copilot

Great question. Let me clarify:

---

**WorkRoom** = Project management / tasks / collaboration
- Manage projects with contractors
- Track tasks, deadlines, progress
- Team communication

**LuxeForge** = Premium/luxury inventory specifically
- Authentication tracking
- High-value item management
- Consignment tracking

---

**You're right to question it.** Here are options:

### Option A: Keep Separate (Current)
```
WorkRoom   → General project/task management
LuxeForge  → Specialized luxury inventory
```
*Good if: You deal heavily in luxury goods needing special tracking (auth, provenance, consignment)*

---

### Option B: Merge LuxeForge into MarketForge
```
MarketForge → All inventory (regular + luxury)
             └─ Luxury items get extra fields (auth status, provenance)
```
*Good if: Luxury is just another product category, not a separate business*

---

### Option C: Merge WorkRoom into ContractorForge
```
ContractorForge → Team + Projects + Tasks
                  (All work management in one place)
```
*Good if: Projects are always contractor-related*

---

**My recommendation based on your business:**

| Your Focus | Best Structure |
|------------|----------------|
| Heavy luxury resale | Keep LuxeForge separate |
| Luxury is side business | Merge into MarketForge |
| Solo + contractors | Merge WorkRoom into ContractorForge |
| Big team/many projects | Keep WorkRoom separate |

---

**What's your business like?** 
- Do you deal a lot in authenticated luxury items?
- Is it mostly you, or a bigger team?

I'll adjust the design based on your answer.
